28422.title: The Incidence of Extreme Economic Stress: Evidence from Utility Disconnections
28422.zh_title: 极端经济压力的发生率：来自公用事业断电的证据
28422.abstract: This paper uses monthly zip code-level data on electricity disconnections to document the socioeconomic correlates of extreme economic distress among 5 million customers in Illinois. In 2018-2019, customers in Black and Hispanic zip codes were about 4 times more likely to be disconnected for non-payment, 2-3 times more likely to be on deferred payment plans, and 70% more likely to participate in utility-based low-income assistance programs, controlling for zip code distributions of income and other demographic characteristics. During the COVID-19 pandemic, there has been a nine-fold expansion in low-income assistance to pay utility bills, but disconnections were double and deferred payment plans triple their historical averages in October 2020. Disconnection notices were served to 2.5% of commercial and industrial accounts, and 3.4% of residential accounts each month in late 2020. About 20% of all accounts were charged late fees. The odds for each of these measures were multiples higher in minority and low-income zip codes.
28422.zh_abstract: 本文利用伊利诺伊州500万客户的月度邮政编码层面电力断电数据，记录了极端经济困境的社会经济相关性。在2018-2019年，控制收入和其他人口特征的邮政编码分布后，黑人和西班牙裔邮政编码区域的客户因未缴费而被断电的可能性约为其他区域的4倍，参与延期付款计划的可能性高出2-3倍，参与基于公用事业的低收入援助计划的可能性高出70%。在COVID-19大流行期间，用于支付水电费的低收入援助扩大了九倍，但2020年10月的断电率是历史平均水平的两倍，延期付款计划是历史平均水平的三倍。2020年末，每月有2.5%的商业和工业账户以及3.4%的住宅账户收到断电通知。约20%的所有账户被收取滞纳金。在少数族裔和低收入邮政编码区域，这些指标的发生几率均高出数倍。

28421.title: Migration, Specialization, and Trade: Evidence from Brazil's March to the West
28421.zh_title: 移民、专业化与贸易：来自巴西“西进运动”的证据
28421.abstract: Exploiting a large migration of farmers to the West of Brazil between 1950 and 2010, we study how migration shapes aggregate and regional comparative advantage. We document that farmers emigrating from regions with high employment in an activity are more likely to work in that activity and have higher income than other migrants doing so. We incorporate this heterogeneity into a quantitative model and find that, by reshaping comparative advantage, declines in migration costs contributed substantially to Brazil's rise as a leading commodity exporter. Opportunities to migrate, moreover, account for a substantial share of the gains from trade.
28421.zh_abstract: 利用1950年至2010年间农民大规模迁移至巴西西部的情况，我们研究了移民如何塑造总体和区域比较优势。我们记录到，从某一活动就业率高的地区迁出的农民，更有可能从事该活动，并且其收入高于从事相同活动的其他移民。我们将这种异质性纳入一个定量模型，发现通过重塑比较优势，移民成本的下降对巴西崛起为领先的大宗商品出口国做出了重大贡献。此外，移民机会解释了贸易收益的很大一部分。

28420.title: A Reconsideration of the Failure of Uncovered Interest Parity for the U.S. Dollar
28420.zh_title: 对美元无抛补利率平价失效的再思考
28420.authors: Charles Engel, Ekaterina Kazakova, Mengqi Wang, Nan Xiang
28420.abstract: We re-examine the time-series evidence for failures of uncovered interest rate parity on short-term deposits for the U.S. dollar versus major currencies of developed countries at short-, medium- and long-horizons. The evidence that interest rate differentials predict foreign exchange risk premiums is fragile. The relationship between interest rates and excess returns is not stable over time and disappears altogether when nominal interest rates are near the zero-lower bound. However, we do find evidence that year-on-year inflation rate differentials consistently predict excess returns – when the U.S. dollar y.o.y. inflation rate has been relatively high, subsequent returns on U.S. deposits tend to be high. We interpret this evidence as being consistent with hypotheses that posit that markets do not fully react initially to predictable changes in future monetary policy. Interestingly, the predictive power of relative y.o.y. inflation only begins in the mid-1980s when central banks began to target inflation more consistently and continues in the post-ZLB period when interest rates lose their primacy as a policy instrument. However, we caution not to rule out the possibility that excess returns are not predictable at all.
28420.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了美元与发达国家主要货币在短期、中期和长期期限的短期存款中无抛补利率平价失效的时间序列证据。利率差异预测外汇风险溢价的证据是脆弱的。利率与超额收益之间的关系随时间推移并不稳定，并且在名义利率接近零下限时完全消失。然而，我们确实发现证据表明，同比通胀率差异持续预测超额收益——当美元同比通胀率相对较高时，随后美国存款的收益往往较高。我们将这一证据解释为与市场最初未能完全反应未来货币政策可预测变化的假设一致。有趣的是，相对同比通胀率的预测能力仅始于20世纪80年代中期，当时央行开始更一致地以通胀为目标，并在后零下限时期（此时利率失去作为政策工具的首要地位）持续存在。然而，我们提醒不要排除超额收益完全不可预测的可能性。

28419.title: Education Gradients in Mortality Trends by Gender and Race
28419.zh_title: 按性别和种族划分的死亡率趋势中的教育梯度
28419.authors: Adam A. Leive, Christopher J. Ruhm
28419.abstract: We examine gender and race differences in education-mortality trends among 25-64 year olds in the United States from 2001-2018. The data indicate that the relationships are heterogeneous with larger mortality reductions for less educated non-Hispanic blacks than other races and mixed results at higher levels of schooling. We also investigate the causes of death associated with changes in overall mortality rates and identify key differences across race groups and education quartiles. Drug overdoses represent the single most important contributor to increased death rates for all groups, but the sizes of these effects vary sharply. Cardiovascular disease, cancer, and HIV are the most significant sources of mortality rate reductions, with the patterns again heterogeneous across sex, race, and educational attainment. These results suggest the limitations of focusing on all-cause mortality rates when attempting to determine the sources of positive and negative health shocks affecting population subgroups. Examining specific causes of death can provide a more nuanced understanding of these trends.
28419.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2001年至2018年美国25-64岁人群中按性别和种族划分的教育-死亡率趋势差异。数据显示，这些关系是异质性的：受教育程度较低的非西班牙裔黑人的死亡率降幅大于其他种族，而在较高教育水平上结果则好坏参半。我们还调查了与总体死亡率变化相关的死亡原因，并识别出不同种族群体和教育四分位数之间的关键差异。药物过量是所有群体死亡率上升的最重要单一因素，但这些影响的大小差异显著。心血管疾病、癌症和艾滋病毒是死亡率下降的最重要来源，其模式再次因性别、种族和教育程度而异。这些结果表明，在试图确定影响人口亚群的正面和负面健康冲击来源时，仅关注全因死亡率的局限性。考察具体死因可以更细致地理解这些趋势。
28419.meta: Programs：ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I12, I14, I24, J10

28418.title: COVID-19 and SMEs: A 2021 "Time Bomb"?
28418.zh_title: COVID-19与中小企业：2021年的“定时炸弹”？
28418.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Veronika Penciakova, Nick Sander
28418.abstract: This paper assesses the prospects of a 2021 time bomb in SME failures triggered by the generous support policies enacted during the 2020 COVID-19 crisis. Policies implemented in 2020, on their own, do not create a 2021 “time-bomb” for SMEs. Rather, business failures and policy costs remain modest. By contrast, credit contraction poses significant risk. Such a contraction would disproportionately impact firms that could survive COVID-19 in 2020 without any fiscal support. Even in that scenario, most business failures would not arise from excessively generous 2020 policies, but rather from the contraction of credit to the corporate sector.
28418.zh_abstract: 本文评估了2020年COVID-19危机期间实施的慷慨支持政策是否会在2021年引发中小企业倒闭的“定时炸弹”。2020年实施的政策本身并不会为中小企业制造2021年的“定时炸弹”。相反，企业倒闭和政策成本仍然温和。相比之下，信贷紧缩构成了重大风险。这种紧缩将不成比例地影响那些在2020年无需任何财政支持就能在COVID-19中幸存的企业。即使在这种情景下，大多数企业倒闭也不会源于2020年过于慷慨的政策，而是源于对企业部门信贷的紧缩。

28417.title: Early Joiners and Startup Performance
28417.zh_title: 早期加入者与初创企业绩效
28417.authors: Joonkyu Choi, Nathan Goldschlag, John C. Haltiwanger, J. Daniel Kim
28417.abstract: We show that early joiners—non-founder employees in the first year—of a startup play a critical role in explaining firm performance. We use administrative employer- employee matched data on all US startups and utilize the premature death of workers as a natural experiment exogenously separating talent from young firms. We find that losing an early joiner has a large negative effect on firm size that persists for at least ten years. When compared to that of a founder, losing an early joiner has a smaller effect on firm death but intensive margin effects on firm size are similar in magnitude. In contrast, losing a later joiner yields only a small and temporary decline in firm performance. We provide evidence that is consistent with the idea that organizational capital, an important driver of startup success, is embodied in early joiners.
28417.zh_abstract: 我们表明，初创企业的早期加入者（第一年的非创始人员工）在解释企业绩效方面发挥着关键作用。我们使用所有美国初创企业的行政雇主-雇员匹配数据，并利用工人的过早死亡作为自然实验，外生地使人才与年轻企业分离。我们发现，失去一名早期加入者对企业规模有持续的负面影响，至少持续十年。与失去创始人相比，失去早期加入者对企业倒闭的影响较小，但对规模的集约边际影响幅度相似。相比之下，失去后期加入者仅导致企业绩效出现微小且暂时的下降。我们提供的证据与以下观点一致：组织资本（初创企业成功的重要驱动因素）体现在早期加入者身上。

28416.title: Real Credit Cycles
28416.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer, Stephen J. Terry
28416.abstract: We incorporate diagnostic expectations into a workhorse neoclassical business cycle model with heterogeneous firms and risky debt. A realistic degree of diagnostic overreaction estimated from US firm forecasts generates economic fragility during good times, countercyclical credit spreads, and boom-bust credit cycles at the firm and aggregate levels. Good times predict future disappointment, spread increases, low bond returns, and investment declines. To generate the size of spread increases observed during 2008-9, the model requires only disappointment of overoptimistic beliefs rather than large negative shocks. Diagnostic expectations offer a realistic, parsimonious way to produce financial reversals in business cycle models.
28416.zh_abstract: 我们将诊断性预期纳入一个包含异质性企业和风险债务的新古典主义商业周期工作模型。从美国企业预测中估计出的现实程度的诊断性过度反应，在繁荣时期产生经济脆弱性、反周期的信贷利差，以及企业和总体层面的繁荣-萧条信贷周期。繁荣时期预示着未来的失望、利差扩大、债券回报率低和投资下降。要产生2008-2009年期间观察到的利差扩大幅度，模型仅需对过度乐观预期的失望，而非巨大的负面冲击。诊断性预期为在商业周期模型中产生金融逆转提供了一种现实且简洁的方法。

28415.title: Economic Fluctuations and Pseudo-Wealth
28415.abstract: What can explain the large changes in aggregate demand that occur in the absence of any seemingly corresponding shock to the underlying state variables of the economy? We show that macroeconomic volatility can arise from dispersions of beliefs among agents. These dispersions give rise to bets and other trades in speculative assets. Such trades give rise to pseudo-wealth, wealth that individuals believe they have on the basis of expectations of returns on these gambles. In the aggregate, when there are enough opportunities for trade and large enough dispersions in beliefs, this perceived wealth may be dangerously untethered from either market wealth or the real wealth of the economy. Given the increased dispersion in beliefs that naturally arises from unprecedented shocks, the theory of pseudo-wealth provides new understandings of both the origins of unanticipated fluctuations and their magnitude, markedly different from prevailing theories grounded in common knowledge and beliefs among individuals. This paper explores the empirical and theoretical underpinnings of pseudo-wealth, links the concept to observed macroeconomic fluctuations, and lays out a research agenda that might help us better understand the role of pseudo-wealth and the circumstances in which it is pronounced.
28415.zh_abstract: 什么可以解释在缺乏任何看似对应的经济基础状态变量冲击的情况下，总需求发生的大幅变化？我们表明，宏观经济波动可能源于经济主体之间的信念分散。这些分散引发了投机性资产上的押注和其他交易。此类交易产生了伪财富，即个体基于对这些赌博回报的预期而认为自己拥有的财富。总体而言，当存在足够多的交易机会和足够大的信念分散时，这种感知到的财富可能危险地脱离市场财富或经济的真实财富。鉴于前所未有的冲击自然会导致信念分散加剧，伪财富理论为理解意外波动的起源及其幅度提供了新的视角，这明显不同于基于个体间共同知识和信念的主流理论。本文探讨了伪财富的实证和理论基础，将该概念与观察到的宏观经济波动联系起来，并提出了一个研究议程，以帮助我们更好地理解伪财富的作用及其显著表现的条件。
28415.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：B22, E03, E21, E44, E60, G01, G12, G18

28414.title: Sales Losses in the First Quarter of the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from California Administrative Data
28414.zh_title: 新冠疫情第一季度销售额损失：来自加州行政数据的证据
28414.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Frank M. Fossen
28414.abstract: COVID-19 led to a massive shutdown of businesses in the second quarter of 2020. Estimates from the CPS, for example, indicate that the number of active business owners dropped by 22 percent from February to April 2020. In this descriptive research note, we provide the first analysis of losses in sales and revenues among the universe of businesses in California using administrative data from the California Department of Tax and Fee Administration. The losses in sales average 17 percent in the second quarter of 2020 relative to the second quarter of 2019 even though year-over-year sales typically grow by 3-4 percent. We find that sales losses were largest in businesses affected by mandatory lockdowns such as Accommodations, which lost 91 percent, whereas online sales grew by 180 percent. Losses also differed substantially across counties with large losses in San Francisco (50 percent) and Los Angeles (24 percent) whereas some counties experienced small gains in sales. Placing business types into different categories based on whether they were essential or non-essential (and thus subject to early lockdowns) and whether they have a moderate or high level of person-to-person contact, we find interesting correlations between sales losses and COVID-19 cases per capita across counties in California. The results suggest that local implementation and enforcement of lockdown restrictions and voluntary behavioral responses as reactions to the perceived local COVID-19 spread both played a role, but enforcement of mandatory restrictions may have had a larger impact on sales losses.
28414.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情导致2020年第二季度企业大规模停业。例如，当前人口调查（CPS）的估计显示，活跃企业主数量从2020年2月到4月下降了22%。在这篇描述性研究笔记中，我们首次利用加州税费管理局的行政数据，分析了加州所有企业的销售额和收入损失。与2019年第二季度相比，2020年第二季度的销售额平均损失了17%，而通常年份间的销售额增长率为3-4%。我们发现，受强制性封锁影响的企业销售额损失最大，例如住宿业损失了91%，而在线销售额增长了180%。各县之间的损失也存在显著差异，旧金山（损失50%）和洛杉矶（损失24%）损失较大，而一些县的销售额略有增长。根据企业类型是否属于必要或非必要（因此受到早期封锁）以及人际接触程度是中等还是高度，我们将企业类型分为不同类别，发现加州各县的销售额损失与人均新冠病例数之间存在有趣的相关性。结果表明，当地封锁限制的实施与执行，以及作为对感知到的当地疫情传播反应的自愿行为改变，都发挥了作用，但强制性限制的执行可能对销售额损失产生了更大的影响。

28413.title: Selection on Welfare Gains: Experimental Evidence from Electricity Plan Choice
28413.zh_title: 福利收益的选择性：来自电力计划选择的实验证据
28413.authors: Koichiro Ito, Takanori Ida, Makoto Tanaka
28413.abstract: We study a problem in which policymakers need to screen self-selected individuals by unobserved heterogeneity in social welfare gains from a policy intervention. In our framework, the marginal treatment effects and marginal treatment responses arise as key statistics to characterize social welfare. We apply this framework to a randomized field experiment on electricity plan choice. Consumers were offered welfare-improving dynamic pricing with randomly assigned take-up incentives. We find that price-elastic consumers—who generate larger welfare gains—are more likely to self-select. Our counterfactual simulations quantify the optimal take-up incentives that exploit observed and unobserved heterogeneity in selection and welfare gains.
28413.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个问题，即政策制定者需要根据政策干预带来的社会福利收益中未观测到的异质性，来筛选自我选择的个体。在我们的框架中，边际处理效应和边际处理响应成为描述社会福利的关键统计量。我们将此框架应用于一项关于电力计划选择的随机实地实验。消费者被提供了福利改善的动态定价，并随机分配了参与激励。我们发现，价格弹性较高的消费者——他们能产生更大的福利收益——更有可能进行自我选择。我们的反事实模拟量化了最优的参与激励，这些激励利用了选择和福利收益中的观测和未观测异质性。

28412.title: Optimal Bailouts in Banking and Sovereign Crises
28412.zh_title: 银行与主权危机中的最优救助
28412.authors: Sewon Hur, César Sosa-Padilla, Zeynep Yom
28412.abstract: We study optimal bailout policies amidst banking and sovereign crises. Our model features sovereign borrowing with limited commitment, where domestic banks hold government debt and extend credit to the private sector. Bank capital shocks can trigger banking crises, prompting the government to consider extending guarantees over bank assets. This poses a trade-off: Larger bailouts relax financial frictions and increase output, but increase fiscal needs and default risk (creating a ‘diabolic loop’). Optimal bailouts exhibit clear properties. The fraction of banking losses the bailouts cover is (i) decreasing in government debt; (ii) increasing in aggregate productivity; and (iii) increasing in the severity of banking crises. Even though bailouts mitigate the adverse effects of banking crises, the economy is ex ante better off without bailouts: Having access to bailouts lowers the cost of defaults, which in turn increases the default frequency, and reduces the levels of debt, output, and consumption.
28412.zh_abstract: 我们研究了银行与主权危机并存时的最优救助政策。我们的模型具有有限承诺下的主权借贷特征，其中国内银行持有政府债务并向私营部门提供信贷。银行资本冲击可能引发银行危机，促使政府考虑对银行资产提供担保。这带来了一个权衡：更大的救助规模能缓解金融摩擦并增加产出，但会增加财政需求和违约风险（形成“恶魔循环”）。最优救助表现出明确的特性。救助覆盖的银行损失比例：（i）随政府债务增加而下降；（ii）随总生产率提高而上升；（iii）随银行危机严重程度加剧而上升。尽管救助缓解了银行危机的不利影响，但从事前角度看，没有救助的经济状况更好：能够获得救助降低了违约成本，这反过来增加了违约频率，并降低了债务、产出和消费水平。

28411.title: Kindleberger Cycles: Method in the madness of crowds?
28411.zh_title: 金德尔伯格周期：群体疯狂中的理性？
28411.abstract: Corporate R&D has a social return far above its internal rate of return to the innovating corporation, and so is chronically underfunded from a social perspective. Kindleberger cycles, irregularly recurring stock market manias, panics, and crashes, prominent in financial history, are also a major problem for mainstream economics. If manias inundating “hot” new technologies with capital sufficiently counter chronic underinvestment in innovation, economy-level selection may favor institutions and behavioral norms conducive to Kindleberger cycles despite individual agents’ losses in panics and crashes.
28411.zh_abstract: 企业研发的社会回报远高于创新企业自身的内部回报率，因此从社会角度来看，研发长期投资不足。金德尔伯格周期——金融史上突出的、不规则重复的股市狂热、恐慌和崩溃——也是主流经济学的一个主要问题。如果涌入“热门”新技术的资本狂热足以抵消创新方面的长期投资不足，那么尽管个体代理人在恐慌和崩溃中遭受损失，但经济层面的选择可能会偏向于有利于金德尔伯格周期的制度和行为规范。
28411.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G01, G02, G4, N2, O16, O3, O33, O4, P1

28409.title: Wage Posting or Wage Bargaining? A Test Using Dual Jobholders
28409.zh_title: 工资设定还是工资谈判？利用双重工作者进行的检验
28409.authors: Marta Lachowska, Alexandre Mas, Raffaele Saggio, Stephen A. Woodbury
28409.abstract: We employ a revealed-preference test to distinguish between wage posting and wage bargaining in the labor market. Using a sample of dual jobholders in Washington State, we estimate the sensitivity of wages and separation rates to wage shocks in a secondary job. In lower parts of the wage distribution, improvements in the outside option lead to higher separations rates but not to higher wages, consistent with wage posting. In the highest wage quartile, improved outside options translate to higher wages, but not higher separation rates, consistent with bargaining. In the aggregate, bargaining appears to be a limited determinant of wage setting.
28409.zh_abstract: 我们采用一种显示性偏好检验来区分劳动力市场中的工资设定和工资谈判。利用华盛顿州双重工作者的样本，我们估计了工资和离职率对次要工作中工资冲击的敏感性。在工资分布的低端部分，外部选择权的改善导致更高的离职率，但并未导致更高的工资，这与工资设定一致。在最高工资四分位数中，外部选择权的改善转化为更高的工资，但并未导致更高的离职率，这与工资谈判一致。总体而言，谈判似乎是工资决定的一个有限因素。

28408.title: Model Complexity, Expectations, and Asset Prices
28408.zh_title: 模型复杂性、预期与资产价格
28408.authors: Pooya Molavi, Alireza Tahbaz-Salehi, Andrea Vedolin
28408.abstract: This paper analyzes how limits to the complexity of statistical models used by market participants can shape asset prices. We consider an economy in which agents can only entertain models with at most k factors, where k may be distinct from the true number of factors that drive the economy’s fundamentals. We first characterize the implications of the resulting departure from rational expectations for return dynamics and relate the extent of return predictability at various horizons to the number of factors in the agents’ models and the statistical properties of the underlying data-generating process. We then apply our framework to two applications in asset pricing: (i) violations of uncovered interest rate parity at different horizons and (ii) momentum and reversal in equity returns. We find that constraints on the complexity of agents’ models can generate return predictability patterns that are consistent with the data.
28408.zh_abstract: 本文分析了市场参与者使用的统计模型复杂性限制如何塑造资产价格。我们考虑一个经济体，其中代理人只能使用最多包含k个因子的模型，而k可能与驱动经济基本面的真实因子数量不同。我们首先刻画了由此产生的对理性预期的偏离对收益动态的影响，并将不同期限的收益可预测性程度与代理人模型中的因子数量以及潜在数据生成过程的统计特性联系起来。然后，我们将我们的框架应用于资产定价中的两个应用：（i）不同期限下未覆盖利率平价的偏离，以及（ii）股票收益中的动量与反转。我们发现，对代理人模型复杂性的约束可以产生与数据一致的收益可预测性模式。

28407.title: Workforce Aging, Pension Reforms, and Firm Outcomes
28407.zh_title: 劳动力老龄化、养老金改革与企业结果
28407.authors: Francesca Carta, Francesco D'Amuri, Till M. von Wachter
28407.abstract: This paper quantifies the effect of a policy-induced sharp increase in retirement ages on input mix and economic outcomes of firms using Italian matched worker-firm data. Data on lifetime pension contributions are used to calculate the expected additional number of older workers employed by each firm due to the reform. Resulting instrumental variable estimates show an increase in older workers leads to a precisely estimated rise in employment of younger workers, value added, and total labor costs at constant labor productivity and unit labor costs. The findings suggest rising institutional retirement ages can help firms to retain valuable older employees.
28407.zh_abstract: 本文利用意大利匹配的工人-企业数据，量化了政策导致的退休年龄大幅提高对企业投入组合和经济结果的影响。利用终身养老金缴款数据，计算了由于改革每家企业在预期中额外雇佣的老年工人数量。由此产生的工具变量估计显示，老年工人的增加导致年轻工人就业、增加值和总劳动力成本在劳动生产率不变和单位劳动力成本不变的情况下出现精确估计的增长。研究结果表明，提高法定退休年龄有助于企业留住有价值的老年员工。

28406.title: Scope Challenges to Social Impact
28406.zh_title: 社会影响力的范围挑战
28406.authors: Monica P. Bhatt, Jonathan Guryan, Jens Ludwig, Anuj K. Shah
28406.abstract: Over the past 50 years, social science has increasingly become involved in the business of not just understanding social problems, but of helping solve them as well. Progress towards this goal will benefit not just from the growing work on solving the challenge of scale, by which we mean the capacity to effectively reach large numbers of people, but also from more attention to the less-appreciated challenge of scope, by which we mean the capacity to change a large share of the decisions that affect a given person’s outcomes. In this essay, we provide a simple framework to help think about the scope of candidate policies, and highlight some common situations that are often associated with potential for large scope.
28406.zh_abstract: 在过去50年里，社会科学越来越不仅致力于理解社会问题，而且帮助解决这些问题。实现这一目标的进展，不仅将受益于日益增长的解决规模挑战的工作（我们指的是有效覆盖大量人群的能力），还将受益于更多关注未被充分认识的范围挑战（我们指的是改变影响特定个人结果的大量决策的能力）。在这篇文章中，我们提供了一个简单的框架来帮助思考候选政策的范围，并强调了一些通常与巨大范围潜力相关的常见情况。

28405.title: Bad Men, Good Roads, Jim Crow, and the Economics of Southern Chain Gangs
28405.zh_title: 恶人、好路、吉姆·克劳与南方锁链囚犯队的经济学
28405.abstract: Penology in the Jim Crow South centered on the chain gang. Gangs ostensibly served three purposes: their severity served as a deterrent; their putting convicts to work on roads and other public improvements reduced the taxpayers’ costs of infrastructure; and their discriminatory implementation reinforced the social order defined by Jim Crow. Drawing on insights from the economics of crime literature, this paper analyzes whether chain gangs reduced road maintenance costs. Using a fixed-effects design, the analysis finds that the costs of using gangs in road maintenance were marginally lower on average than using wage labor. The results are consistent with county officials choosing between convict and free labor in manner consistent with minimizing taxpayers’ costs.
28405.zh_abstract: 吉姆·克劳法时期南方的刑罚学以锁链囚犯队为核心。这些囚犯队表面上服务于三个目的：其严厉性起到威慑作用；将囚犯用于修路及其他公共设施改善，降低了纳税人的基础设施成本；其歧视性执行强化了吉姆·克劳法所定义的社会秩序。本文借鉴犯罪经济学文献的见解，分析了锁链囚犯队是否降低了道路维护成本。采用固定效应设计，分析发现，使用囚犯队进行道路维护的成本平均略低于使用雇佣劳动力。结果与县级官员在囚犯劳动与自由劳动之间进行选择以最小化纳税人成本的方式一致。

28404.title: Exchange Rates and Prices: Evidence from the 2015 Swiss Franc Appreciation
28404.zh_title: 汇率与价格：来自2015年瑞士法郎升值的证据
28404.authors: Raphael Auer, Ariel Burstein, Sarah M. Lein
28404.abstract: We dissect the impact of a large and sudden exchange rate appreciation on Swiss border import prices, retail prices, and consumer expenditures on domestic and imported non-durable goods, following the removal of the EUR/CHF floor in January 2015. Cross-sectional variation in border price changes by currency of invoicing carries over to consumer prices and allocations, impacting retail prices of imports and competing domestic goods, as well as import expenditures. We provide measures of the sensitivity of retail import prices to border prices and the sensitivity of import shares to relative prices, which is higher when using retail prices than border prices.
28404.zh_abstract: 我们剖析了2015年1月瑞士法郎兑欧元汇率下限取消后，一次大规模且突然的汇率升值对瑞士边境进口价格、零售价格以及家庭在国内外非耐用品上的消费支出的影响。边境价格变化按计价货币划分的横截面差异传导至消费者价格和配置，影响了进口商品和竞争性国内商品的零售价格，以及进口支出。我们提供了零售进口价格对边境价格的敏感度以及进口份额对相对价格的敏感度的度量，其中使用零售价格时的敏感度高于使用边境价格时的敏感度。

28403.title: A Theory of Power Structure and Institutional Compatibility: China vs. Europe Revisited
28403.zh_title: 权力结构与制度兼容性理论：中国与欧洲再审视
28403.authors: Ruixue Jia, Gérard Roland, Yang Xie
28403.abstract: Despite a large consensus among economists on the strong interdependence and synergy between pro-development institutions, how should one understand why Imperial China, with weaker rule of law and property rights, gave the commoners more opportunities to access elite status than Premodern Europe, for example via the civil service exam and the absence of hereditary titles? Supported by rich historical narratives, we show that these institutional differences reflect more general differences in the power structure of society: (1) the Ruler enjoyed weaker absolute power in Europe; (2) the People were more on par with the Elites in China in terms of power and rights. Based on these narratives, we build a game-theoretical model and analyze how the power structure can shape the stability of an autocratic rule. If we read greater absolute power of the Ruler as conditioning more of the power and rights of the ruled on the Ruler's will, we show that a more symmetric Elite–People relationship can stabilize autocratic rule. If absolute power is stronger, this stabilizing effect will be stronger, and the Ruler's incentive to promote such symmetry will be greater. The theory explains the power structure differences between Imperial China and Premodern Europe, as well as specific institutions such as the bureaucracy in China and the role of cities in Europe. It is also consistent with the observation that autocratic rule was more stable in Imperial China than in Premodern Europe.
28403.zh_abstract: 尽管经济学家普遍认为促进发展的制度之间存在强烈的相互依赖和协同作用，但如何理解为何帝制中国尽管法治和产权较弱，却比前现代欧洲为平民提供了更多获得精英地位的机会，例如通过科举制度和缺乏世袭头衔？在丰富历史叙事的支持下，我们表明这些制度差异反映了社会权力结构中更普遍的差异：（1）欧洲统治者的绝对权力较弱；（2）中国平民在权力和权利方面与精英更为平等。基于这些叙事，我们构建了一个博弈论模型，并分析了权力结构如何塑造专制统治的稳定性。如果我们将统治者更大的绝对权力解读为将被统治者的更多权力和权利取决于统治者的意志，我们表明，更对称的精英-平民关系可以稳定专制统治。如果绝对权力更强，这种稳定效应会更强，统治者促进这种对称性的动机也会更大。该理论解释了帝制中国与前现代欧洲之间的权力结构差异，以及诸如中国的官僚制度和欧洲城市角色等具体制度。它也与帝制中国专制统治比前现代欧洲更稳定的观察结果一致。

28402.title: The Worker-Job Surplus
28402.abstract: The worker-job surplus — the sum of the worker's and the employer's net values of an employment relationship — is the object that drives decisions in most matching models of the labor market. In this paper, we develop a theory-based empirical method to determine which of the observable worker and job characteristics impact the worker-job surplus in the data. To do so, we exploit the mobility choices of employed workers. Our method further indicates whether workers sort along those surplus-relevant attributes when searching for jobs. It also provides a test of the commonly used single-index assumption, according to which worker and job heterogeneity can each be summarized by scalar indices. We implement our method on US data using the Survey of Income and Program Participation and the O*NET. The results suggest that a relatively sparse model underlies the data. On the job side, a cognitive and an interpersonal skill requirement impact the surplus along with the (dis)amenity of work duration as well as the workplace size. On the worker side, we find that most of the relevant characteristics are symmetric to the selected job requirements. We reject the existence of a single-index representation of these relevant multi-dimensional worker and job attributes. We then use our results in a new approach to defining the economy's labor submarkets, highlighting a potentially important application of our methodology.
28402.zh_abstract: 工人-职位剩余——工人和雇主对雇佣关系净价值的总和——是驱动大多数劳动力市场匹配模型决策的对象。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于理论的实证方法，以确定哪些可观测的工人和职位特征会影响数据中的工人-职位剩余。为此，我们利用了在职工人的流动选择。我们的方法进一步表明，工人在搜索工作时是否根据这些与剩余相关的属性进行分类。它还提供了对常用单指数假设的检验，根据该假设，工人和职位的异质性可以分别由标量指数概括。我们使用收入与计划参与调查和O*NET数据在美国数据上实施我们的方法。结果表明，数据背后是一个相对稀疏的模型。在职位方面，认知和人际技能要求以及工作时长的（非）舒适性和工作场所规模会影响剩余。在工人方面，我们发现大多数相关特征与所选职位要求对称。我们拒绝了这些相关的多维工人和职位属性存在单指数表示的观点。然后，我们使用我们的结果，以一种新方法定义经济体的劳动力子市场，突出了我们方法的一个潜在重要应用。

28401.title: The Productivity Consequences of Pollution-Induced Migration in China
28401.zh_title: 中国污染诱发移民的生产率后果
28401.authors: Gaurav Khanna, Wenquan Liang, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak, Ran Song
28401.abstract: Migration and pollution are two defining features of China's impressive growth performance over the last 30 years. In this paper we study the migration response to pollution in Chinese cities, and its consequences for productivity and welfare. We document a robust pattern in which skilled workers emigrate more in response to pollution than the unskilled. Their greater sensitivity to air quality holds up in cross-sectional variation across cities, panel variation with individual fixed-effects, and when instrumenting for pollution using distant power-plants upwind of cities, or thermal inversions that trap pollution. Pollution therefore changes the spatial distribution of skilled and unskilled workers, which results in higher returns to skill in cities that the educated migrate away from. We quantify the loss in aggregate productivity due to this re-sorting by estimating a model of demand and supply of skilled and unskilled workers across Chinese cities. Counterfactual simulations from the estimated model show that reducing pollution would increase productivity through spatial re-sorting by approximately as much as the direct health benefits of clean air. Physical and institutional restrictions on mobility exacerbate welfare losses. People's dislike of pollution explains a substantial portion of the wage gap between cities.
28401.zh_abstract: 移民和污染是中国过去30年令人瞩目的增长表现的两个决定性特征。在本文中，我们研究了中国城市中移民对污染的反应，及其对生产率和福利的影响。我们记录了一个稳健的模式，即技能工人比非技能工人更倾向于因污染而移民。他们对空气质量的更高敏感性在城市的横截面变化、包含个体固定效应的面板变化中均成立，并且在利用城市上风向的远距离电厂或困住污染的热逆温作为污染的工具变量时也成立。因此，污染改变了技能工人和非技能工人的空间分布，导致受教育者迁离的城市技能回报率更高。我们通过估计中国城市中技能和非技能工人的需求和供给模型，量化了这种重新分类导致的总体生产率损失。估计模型的反事实模拟表明，减少污染将通过空间重新分类提高生产率，其幅度大约与清洁空气的直接健康效益相当。对流动性的物理和制度限制加剧了福利损失。人们对污染的厌恶解释了城市间工资差距的很大一部分。
28401.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J61, O18, Q52, R12

28400.title: Marriage Dynamics, Earnings Dynamics, and Lifetime Family Income
28400.zh_title: 婚姻动态、收入动态与终身家庭收入
28400.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, Daniel Giraldo Páez, Disa M. Hynsjo, Ivan Vidangos
28400.abstract: We estimate a statistical model of individual earnings, marriage (with marital sorting), divorce, fertility, and nonlabor income. For the 1935-44, 1945-62, and 1964-74 birth cohorts, we use the model to measure the dynamic responses of earnings and family income to labor market shocks, changes in marital status, education differences and permanent wage differences. The model enables us to isolate the importance of effects operating through marriage probabilities and through spouse characteristics (sorting). We find that gender differences in the responses are large but have declined across cohorts. The decline reflects the increase in the labor supply and wage rates of married women as well as other changes. For each cohort, we also provide gender-specific estimates of the contribution of education, permanent wage, employment and hours heterogeneity, labor market shocks, spouse characteristics, spouse wage shocks, and marital histories to the variance of lifetime family income. For women, own characteristics have become increasingly important in the determination of lifetime family income, while spouse characteristics have become less important. The opposite is true for men. Gender differences in the sources of inequality in lifetime family income have narrowed.
28400.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个包含个人收入、婚姻（含婚姻匹配）、离婚、生育和非劳动收入的统计模型。针对1935-44年、1945-62年和1964-74年出生队列，我们使用该模型衡量了收入与家庭收入对劳动力市场冲击、婚姻状况变化、教育差异和永久性工资差异的动态反应。该模型使我们能够分离出通过婚姻概率和配偶特征（匹配）发挥作用的效应的重要性。我们发现，性别差异在反应中很大，但跨队列有所下降。这种下降反映了已婚女性劳动供给和工资率的增加以及其他变化。对于每个队列，我们还提供了按性别划分的估计，涉及教育、永久性工资、就业和工时异质性、劳动力市场冲击、配偶特征、配偶工资冲击以及婚姻史对终身家庭收入方差的贡献。对于女性，自身特征在决定终身家庭收入中变得越来越重要，而配偶特征则变得不那么重要。对于男性则相反。终身家庭收入不平等来源的性别差异已经缩小。
28400.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D1, D31, J01, J10, J12, J16, J31

28451.title: Low Energy: Estimating Electric Vehicle Electricity Use
28451.zh_title: 低能耗：估算电动汽车的用电量
28451.authors: Fiona Burlig, James B. Bushnell, David S. Rapson, Catherine Wolfram
28451.abstract: We provide the first at-scale estimate of electric vehicle (EV) home charging. Previous estimates are either based on surveys that reach conflicting conclusions, or are extrapolated from a small, unrepresentative sample of households with dedicated EV meters. We combine billions of hourly electricity meter measurements with address-level EV registration records from California households. The average EV increases overall household load by 2.9 kilowatt-hours per day, less than half the amount assumed by state regulators. Our results imply that EVs travel 5,300 miles per year, under half of the US fleet average. This raises questions about transportation electrification for climate policy.
28451.zh_abstract: 我们提供了首个大规模估算电动汽车家庭充电用电量的研究。此前的估算要么基于得出相互矛盾结论的调查，要么是从一个拥有专用电表的小规模、非代表性家庭样本中推断出来的。我们结合了数十亿个每小时电表测量数据与加利福尼亚州家庭地址级别的电动汽车注册记录。平均而言，电动汽车使家庭总负荷每天增加2.9千瓦时，不到州监管机构假设值的一半。我们的结果表明，电动汽车每年行驶5300英里，不到美国车队平均水平的一半。这引发了关于交通电气化气候政策有效性的疑问。

28450.title: Just Above the Exam Cutoff Score: Elite College Admission and Wages in China
28450.zh_title: 略高于高考录取分数线：中国的精英大学录取与工资
28450.abstract: A burgeoning literature has documented the importance of elite colleges. Yet, little is known about access to elite education and its labor market implications in China, a country that produces one in every five college graduates in the world. College admission in China is governed by a single exam—the national college entrance exam, and the government sets admission cutoff scores for elite colleges. We examine the impacts of scoring above the elite-tier cutoff on a student's access to elite colleges and wage outcomes after graduation, using the discontinuity around the cutoff score. By employing hand-collected survey data, we find that scoring above the cutoff not only increases the chance of entering an elite college but also raises a young person's first-job wages after graduation. We also find that those just above the cutoff have peers with higher scores and better social networks than those below the cutoff, but it is less clear whether the two groups use their time differently in college.
28450.zh_abstract: 大量文献已记录了精英大学的重要性。然而，在中国这个全球每五个大学毕业生中就有一个来自的国家，关于精英教育机会及其劳动力市场影响的研究仍然很少。中国的高校录取由单一考试——全国高考——决定，政府为精英大学设定录取分数线。我们利用分数线附近的断点，研究了分数高于精英大学录取线对学生进入精英大学的机会以及毕业后的工资结果的影响。通过使用手工收集的调查数据，我们发现，分数高于录取线不仅增加了进入精英大学的机会，还提高了年轻人毕业后的首份工作工资。我们还发现，略高于分数线的学生比略低于分数线的学生拥有分数更高、社交网络更好的同伴，但这两组学生在大学期间的时间利用方式是否存在差异尚不明确。
28450.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H1, I20, I25, I26

28449.title: Addressing Partial Identification in Climate Modeling and Policy Analysis
28449.zh_title: 应对气候建模与政策分析中的部分识别问题
28449.authors: Charles F. Manski, Alan H. Sanstad, Stephen J. DeCanio
28449.abstract: Numerical simulations of the global climate system provide inputs to integrated assessment modeling for estimating the impacts of greenhouse gas mitigation and other policies to address global climate change. While essential tools for this purpose, computational climate models are subject to considerable uncertainty, including inter-model “structural” uncertainty. Structural uncertainty analysis has emphasized simple or weighted averaging of the outputs of multi-model ensembles, sometimes with subjective Bayesian assignment of probabilities across models. However, choosing appropriate weights is problematic. To use climate simulations in integrated assessment, we propose instead framing climate model uncertainty as a problem of partial identification, or “deep” uncertainty. This terminology refers to situations in which the underlying mechanisms, dynamics, or laws governing a system are not completely known and cannot be credibly modeled definitively even in the absence of data limitations in a statistical sense. We propose the min-max regret (MMR) decision criterion to account for deep climate uncertainty in integrated assessment without weighting climate model forecasts. We develop a theoretical framework for cost-benefit analysis of climate policy based on MMR, and apply it computationally with a simple integrated assessment model. We suggest avenues for further research.
28449.zh_abstract: 全球气候系统的数值模拟为综合评估模型提供了输入，用于估算温室气体减排及其他应对全球气候变化政策的影响。尽管气候模型是实现这一目的的重要工具，但它们面临着相当大的不确定性，包括模型间的“结构性”不确定性。结构性不确定性分析强调对多模型集合的输出进行简单或加权平均，有时会采用主观贝叶斯方法跨模型分配概率。然而，选择合适的权重是有问题的。为了在综合评估中使用气候模拟，我们建议将气候模型不确定性框架化为部分识别或“深度”不确定性问题。这一术语指的是系统的基本机制、动态或规律未被完全了解，即使在统计意义上没有数据限制的情况下，也无法可靠地、确定性地建模。我们提出了最小-最大遗憾决策准则，以在不加权气候模型预测的情况下，在综合评估中考虑深度气候不确定性。我们基于最小-最大遗憾准则开发了一个气候政策成本效益分析的理论框架，并使用一个简单的综合评估模型进行计算应用。我们提出了进一步研究的方向。

28448.title: The Immigrant Next Door: Long-Term Contact, Generosity, and Prejudice
28448.zh_title: 邻家的移民：长期接触、慷慨与偏见
28448.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Thomas Chaney, Tarek Alexander Hassan, Aakaash Rao
28448.abstract: We study how decades-long exposure to individuals of a given foreign descent shapes natives' attitudes and behavior toward that group. Using individualized donations data from large charitable organizations, we show that long-term exposure to a given foreign ancestry leads to more generous behavior specifically toward that group's ancestral country. To shed light on mechanisms, we focus on attitudes and behavior toward Arab-Muslims, combining several existing large-scale surveys, cross-county data on implicit prejudice, and a newly-collected national survey. We show that greater long-term exposure: (i) decreases both explicit and implicit prejudice against Arab-Muslims, (ii) reduces support for policies and political candidates hostile toward Arab-Muslims, (iii) leads to more personal contact with Arab-Muslim individuals, and (iv) increases knowledge of Arab-Muslims and Islam in general.
28448.zh_abstract: 我们研究了长达数十年的、对某一特定外国血统个体的接触如何塑造本地人对该群体的态度和行为。利用大型慈善组织的个性化捐赠数据，我们表明，长期接触某一特定外国血统会导致对该群体祖籍国更慷慨的行为。为了阐明机制，我们聚焦于对阿拉伯裔穆斯林的态度和行为，结合了多项现有大规模调查、县级内隐偏见数据以及一项新收集的全国性调查。我们发现，更长期的接触会：（i）减少对阿拉伯裔穆斯林的外显和内隐偏见，（ii）降低对敌视阿拉伯裔穆斯林的政策和政治候选人的支持，（iii）导致与阿拉伯裔穆斯林个体的更多个人接触，以及（iv）增加对阿拉伯裔穆斯林和伊斯兰教的一般性了解。

28447.title: Forecasting the U.S. Dollar in the 21st Century
28447.authors: Charles Engel, Steve Pak Yeung Wu
28447.abstract: The level of the (log of) the exchange rate seems to have strong forecasting power for dollar exchange rates against major currencies post-2000 at medium- to long-run horizons of 12-, 36- and 60-months. We find that this is true using conventional asymptotic statistics correcting for serial correlation biases. But correcting for small-sample bias using simulation methods, we find little evidence to reject a random walk. This small sample bias arises because of near-spurious correlation when the predictor variable is persistent and the horizon for exchange rate forecasts is long. Similar problems of spurious correlation may arise when other persistent variables are used to forecast changes in the exchange rate. We find, in fact, using asymptotic statistics, the level of the exchange rate provides better forecasts than economic measures of “global risk”, and the measures of global risk do not improve the (possibly spurious) forecasting power of the level of the exchange rate.
28447.zh_abstract: 在2000年之后，汇率（对数）水平似乎对美元兑主要货币的中长期（12个月、36个月和60个月）汇率具有强大的预测能力。我们发现，使用校正序列相关偏差的传统渐近统计量时，这一结论成立。但使用模拟方法校正小样本偏差后，我们几乎没有发现拒绝随机游走的证据。这种小样本偏差的产生是因为当预测变量具有持久性且汇率预测的期限较长时，存在近乎虚假的相关性。当使用其他持久性变量预测汇率变化时，也可能出现类似的虚假相关问题。事实上，我们发现，使用渐近统计量时，汇率水平比“全球风险”的经济度量提供了更好的预测，而全球风险度量并未提高汇率水平（可能虚假的）预测能力。

28446.title: Vaccination Planning under Uncertainty, with Application to Covid-19
28446.zh_title: 不确定性下的疫苗接种规划——以新冠肺炎为例
28446.abstract: Vaccination against infectious disease may be beneficial to reduce illness in vaccinated persons and disease transmission across the population. The welfare-economic practice of specifying a social welfare function and considering a planner who seeks to optimize welfare provides a constructive framework to evaluate vaccination policy. This paper characterizes choice of vaccination policy as a planning problem that aims to minimize the social cost of illness and vaccination. Manski (2010, 2017) studied vaccination as a problem of planning under uncertainty, assuming that a planner can choose any vaccination rate or that the planner has only two options: mandate or decentralize vaccination. The analysis focused on uncertainty regarding the effect of vaccination on disease transmission. Here I weaken the assumptions to recognize multiple uncertainties relevant to evaluation of policy for vaccination against COVID-19. These include uncertainty not only about the effect of vaccination on disease transmission, but also about the fraction of susceptible persons in the population, the effectiveness of vaccination in reducing illness and infectiousness, and the health risks associated with vaccination. The paper considers planning under ambiguity using the minimax and minimax-regret criteria, as well as planning using a subjective probability distribution on unknown quantities. It develops algorithms that may be applied flexibly to determine policy choices with specified degrees and types of uncertainty.
28446.zh_abstract: 针对传染病的疫苗接种可能有益于减少接种者的疾病以及降低疾病在人群中的传播。福利经济学的实践——即设定一个社会福利函数并考虑一个寻求优化福利的规划者——为评估疫苗接种政策提供了一个建设性框架。本文将疫苗接种政策的选择描述为一个旨在最小化疾病和疫苗接种社会成本的规划问题。Manski（2010, 2017）将疫苗接种视为一个不确定性下的规划问题，假设规划者可以选择任何接种率，或者规划者只有两种选择：强制接种或分散接种。分析侧重于疫苗接种对疾病传播影响的不确定性。在此，我放宽假设，以认识到与评估新冠肺炎疫苗接种政策相关的多种不确定性。这些不确定性不仅包括疫苗接种对疾病传播影响的不确定性，还包括人群中易感者比例、疫苗接种在减少疾病和传染性方面的有效性，以及与疫苗接种相关的健康风险。本文考虑了使用最小-最大和最小-最大遗憾准则的模糊性下的规划，以及使用未知量的主观概率分布的规划。它开发了可以灵活应用的算法，以在指定程度和类型的不确定性下确定政策选择。

28445.title: Unemployment in the Time of COVID-19: A Flow-Based Approach to Real-time Unemployment Projections
28445.zh_title: 新冠疫情时期的失业：基于流量方法的实时失业率预测
28445.authors: Ayşegül Şahin, Murat Tasci, Jin Yan
28445.abstract: This paper presents a flow-based methodology for real-time unemployment rate projections and shows that this approach performed considerably better at the onset of the COVID-19 recession in the spring 2020 in predicting the peak unemployment rate as well as its rapid decline over the year. It presents an alternative scenario analysis for 2021 based on this methodology and argues that the unemployment rate is likely to decline to 5.4 percent by the end of 2021. The predictive power of the methodology comes from its combined use of real-time data with the flow approach.
28445.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种基于流量方法的实时失业率预测方法，并表明该方法在2020年春季新冠疫情衰退初期，在预测失业率峰值及其随后一年内的快速下降方面表现显著更优。本文基于该方法对2021年进行了替代情景分析，并认为失业率到2021年底可能降至5.4%。该方法的预测能力源于其将实时数据与流量方法结合使用。

28444.title: The Price and Quantity of Interest Rate Risk
28444.zh_title: 利率风险的价格与数量
28444.authors: Jennifer N. Carpenter, Fangzhou Lu, Robert F. Whitelaw
28444.abstract: Studies of the dynamics of bond risk premia that do not account for the corresponding dynamics of bond risk are hard to interpret. We propose a new approach to modeling bond risk and risk premia. For each of the US and China, we reduce the government bond market to its first two principal-component bond-factor portfolios. For each bond-factor portfolio, we estimate the joint dynamics of its volatility and Sharpe ratio as functions of yield curve variables, and of VIX in the US. We have three main findings. (1) There is an important second factor in bond risk premia. (2) Time variation in bond return volatility is as important as time variation in bond Sharpe ratios. (3) Bond risk premia are solely compensation for bond risk, as no-arbitrage theory predicts. Our approach also allows us to document interesting cyclical and secular time-variation in the term structure of bond risk premia in both the US and China.
28444.zh_abstract: 未考虑债券风险相应动态的债券风险溢价动态研究难以解释。我们提出了一种新的债券风险与风险溢价建模方法。针对美国和中国，我们将政府债券市场简化为前两个主成分债券因子投资组合。对于每个债券因子投资组合，我们估计其波动率和夏普比率的联合动态，作为收益率曲线变量以及美国VIX的函数。我们有三项主要发现：(1) 债券风险溢价中存在重要的第二因子。(2) 债券收益波动率的时间变化与债券夏普比率的时间变化同等重要。(3) 正如无套利理论所预测的，债券风险溢价完全是对债券风险的补偿。我们的方法还使我们能够记录美国和中国的债券风险溢价期限结构中有趣的周期性和长期时间变化。

28443.title: Are Behavioral Change Interventions Needed to Make Cash Transfer Programs Work for Children? Experimental Evidence from Myanmar
28443.zh_title: 现金转移计划是否需要对儿童产生效果的行为改变干预？来自缅甸的实验证据
28443.authors: Erica M. Field, Elisa M. Maffioli
28443.abstract: We experimentally evaluate the impact on child malnutrition of a maternal cash transfer program in Myanmar that was supplemented with Social Behavior Change Communication (SBCC) in a subset of villages. The combination of interventions significantly reduced the proportion of children stunted, while cash alone had no impact on stunting. SBCC appears to have worked in conjunction with cash to reduce stunting by encouraging mothers to increase children’s total calories and protein consumed. The findings provide evidence that information constraints contribute to low income-elasticity of calorie demand among malnourished populations, and underscore the importance of adding SBCC to cash transfer programs.
28443.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验评估了缅甸一项母亲现金转移计划对儿童营养不良的影响，该计划在部分村庄辅以社会行为改变沟通。干预组合显著降低了儿童发育迟缓的比例，而仅现金对发育迟缓没有影响。社会行为改变沟通似乎与现金共同作用，通过鼓励母亲增加儿童的总热量和蛋白质摄入来减少发育迟缓。这些发现表明，信息约束导致了营养不良人群中卡路里需求的低收入弹性，并强调了在现金转移计划中增加社会行为改变沟通的重要性。

28442.title: Solar Geoengineering, Learning, and Experimentation
28442.zh_title: 太阳地球工程、学习与实验
28442.authors: David L. Kelly, Garth Heutel, Juan B. Moreno-Cruz, Soheil Shayegh
28442.abstract: Solar geoengineering (SGE) can combat climate change by directly reducing temperatures. Both SGE and the climate itself are surrounded by great uncertainties. Implementing SGE affects learning about these uncertainties. We model endogenous learning over two uncertainties: the sensitivity of temperatures to carbon concentrations (the climate sensitivity), and the effectiveness of SGE in lowering temperatures. We present both theoretical and simulation results from an integrated assessment model, focusing on the informational value of SGE experimentation. Surprisingly, under current calibrated conditions, SGE deployment slows learning, causing a less informed decision. For any reasonably sized experimental SGE deployment, the temperature change becomes closer to zero, and thus more obscured by noisy weather shocks. Still, some SGE use is optimal despite, not because of, its informational value. The optimal amount of SGE is very sensitive to beliefs about both uncertainties.
28442.zh_abstract: 太阳地球工程可以通过直接降低温度来应对气候变化。太阳地球工程和气候本身都充满巨大不确定性。实施太阳地球工程会影响对这些不确定性的学习。我们针对两个不确定性进行内生学习建模：温度对碳浓度的敏感性（气候敏感性），以及太阳地球工程降低温度的有效性。我们通过一个综合评估模型展示了理论和模拟结果，重点关注太阳地球工程实验的信息价值。令人惊讶的是，在当前校准条件下，太阳地球工程的部署减缓了学习，导致决策信息不足。对于任何合理规模的实验性太阳地球工程部署，温度变化趋近于零，因此更容易被嘈杂的天气冲击所掩盖。尽管如此，最优的太阳地球工程使用量仍然存在，尽管其信息价值并非原因。太阳地球工程的最优数量对关于这两个不确定性的信念非常敏感。

28441.title: Uncovering the Hidden Effort Problem
28441.authors: Azi Ben-Rephael, Bruce I. Carlin, Zhi Da, Ryan D. Israelsen
28441.abstract: We use machine learning to analyze minute-by-minute Bloomberg online status data and study how the effort provision of top executives in public corporations affects firm value. While executives likely spend most of their time doing other activities, Bloomberg usage data allows us to characterize their work habits. We document a positive effect of effort on unexpected earnings, cumulative abnormal returns following firm earnings announcements, and credit default swap spreads. We form long-short, calendar-time, effort portfolios and show that they earn significant average daily returns. Finally, we revisit several agency issues that have received attention in the prior academic literature on executive compensation.
28441.zh_abstract: 我们使用机器学习分析逐分钟的彭博在线状态数据，研究上市公司高管的努力供给如何影响公司价值。虽然高管可能将大部分时间花在其他活动上，但彭博使用数据使我们能够描述他们的工作习惯。我们记录了努力对意外收益、公司盈利公告后的累计异常回报以及信用违约互换利差的正面影响。我们构建了多空、日历时间、努力投资组合，并显示它们获得了显著的平均日回报。最后，我们重新审视了先前关于高管薪酬的学术文献中受到关注的几个代理问题。
28441.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS；JEL：D22, D82, G32, M52

28440.title: Uneven Growth: Automation's Impact on Income and Wealth Inequality
28440.zh_title: 不均衡的增长：自动化对收入和财富不平等的影响
28440.authors: Benjamin Moll, Lukasz Rachel, Pascual Restrepo
28440.abstract: The benefits of new technologies accrue not only to high-skilled labor but also to owners of capital in the form of higher capital incomes. This increases inequality. To make this argument, we develop a tractable theory that links technology to the personal income and wealth distributions – and not just that of wages – and use it to study the distributional effects of automation. We isolate a new theoretical mechanism: automation increases inequality via returns to wealth. The flip side of such return movements is that automation is more likely to lead to stagnant wages and therefore stagnant incomes at the bottom of the distribution. We use a multi-asset model extension to confront differing empirical trends in returns to productive and safe assets and show that the relevant return measures have increased over time. Automation accounts for part of the observed trends in income and wealth inequality and macroeconomic aggregates.
28440.zh_abstract: 新技术的收益不仅归于高技能劳动力，还以更高资本收入的形式归于资本所有者。这加剧了不平等。为论证这一点，我们发展了一个易于处理的理论，将技术与个人收入和财富分配（而不仅仅是工资分配）联系起来，并用它来研究自动化的分配效应。我们分离出一个新的理论机制：自动化通过财富回报加剧不平等。这种回报变动的另一面是，自动化更可能导致工资停滞，从而使得分配底层的收入停滞。我们使用多资产模型扩展来面对生产性资产和安全资产回报的不同经验趋势，并显示相关回报指标随时间上升。自动化解释了观察到的收入和财富不平等以及宏观经济总量趋势的一部分。

28439.title: The Health Costs of Cost-Sharing
28439.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Evan Flack, Ziad Obermeyer
28439.abstract: What happens when patients suddenly stop taking their medications? We study the health consequences of drug interruptions caused by large, abrupt, and arbitrary changes in price. Medicare’s prescription drug benefit as-if-randomly assigns 65-year-olds a drug budget as a function of their birth month, beyond which out-of-pocket costs suddenly increase. Those facing smaller budgets consume fewer drugs and die more: 0.0164 percentage points per month (13.9%) for each $\$100$ per month budget decrease (24.4%). This estimate is robust to a range of falsification checks, and lies in the 97.4th percentile of 541 placebo estimates, formed in similar populations that lack the same idiosyncratic budget policy. Several facts help make sense of this large effect. First, patients stop taking drugs that are both ‘high-value,’ and suspected to cause life-threatening withdrawal syndromes when stopped. Second, using machine learning, we identify patients at the highest risk of drug-preventable adverse events. Contrary to the predictions of standard economic models, high-risk patients (e.g., those most likely to have a heart attack) cut back more than low-risk patients on exactly those drugs that would benefit them the most (e.g., statins). Finally, patients appear unaware of these risks. In a survey of 65-year-olds, only one-third believe that missing their drugs for up to a month could have any serious consequences. We conclude that, far from curbing waste, cost-sharing policies cause patients to miss opportunities to buy health at very low cost ($\$11,321$ per life-year).
28439.zh_abstract: 当患者突然停止服药时会发生什么？我们研究了由价格大幅、突然和任意变化引起的药物中断的健康后果。医疗保险的处方药福利根据出生月份准随机地将65岁人群分配到一个药物预算，超出后自付费用突然增加。面临较小预算的人服用更少的药物并死亡更多：每减少100美元/月的预算（24.4%），死亡率每月增加0.0164个百分点（13.9%）。这一估计在一系列证伪检验中稳健，并且位于541个安慰剂估计的第97.4百分位，这些安慰剂估计是在缺乏相同特殊预算政策的类似人群中形成的。几个事实有助于理解这一巨大效应。首先，患者停止服用那些既“高价值”又可能在停药时导致危及生命的戒断综合征的药物。其次，使用机器学习，我们识别出处于药物可预防不良事件最高风险的患者。与标准经济模型的预测相反，高风险患者（例如，最可能心脏病发作的患者）比低风险患者更大幅度地减少了那些对他们最有益的药物（例如，他汀类药物）。最后，患者似乎对这些风险一无所知。在一项针对65岁人群的调查中，只有三分之一的人认为错过服药长达一个月可能产生任何严重后果。我们得出结论，成本分担政策远非遏制浪费，反而导致患者错失以非常低的成本（每生命年11,321美元）购买健康的机会。

28438.title: What Do Happiness Data Mean? Theory and Survey Evidence
28438.zh_title: 幸福数据意味着什么？理论与调查证据
28438.authors: Daniel J. Benjamin, Jakina Debnam Guzman, Marc Fleurbaey, Ori Heffetz, Miles S. Kimball
28438.abstract: What utility notion—e.g., flow/lifetime, self/family-centered—do self-reported well-being (SWB) questions measure? Existing applications make different assumptions regarding the (i) life domains, (ii) time horizons, and (iii) other-regarding preferences captured by SWB data. To obtain relevant evidence, we ask survey respondents what they had in mind regarding (i)–(iii) when answering commonly used—life satisfaction, happiness, ladder—and new SWB questions. We find that respondents’ self-reports differ from researchers’ assumptions, and differ across SWB questions and sociodemographic groups. At the same time, simple SWB-question wording tweaks are effective in moving self-reports towards desired interpretations. We outline actionable suggestions for SWB researchers.
28438.zh_abstract: 自我报告幸福感问题衡量的是哪种效用概念——例如，流动/终身、自我/家庭中心？现有应用对幸福感数据所捕捉的（i）生活领域、（ii）时间跨度和（iii）利他偏好做出了不同假设。为获取相关证据，我们询问调查受访者在回答常用问题——生活满意度、幸福感、阶梯——以及新的幸福感问题时，他们对（i）-（iii）的考虑。我们发现，受访者的自我报告与研究人员的假设不同，并且在不同的幸福感问题和社会人口群体之间存在差异。同时，简单的幸福感问题措辞调整能有效使自我报告向期望的解释靠拢。我们为幸福感研究人员概述了可操作的建议。

28437.title: How the New Fed Municipal Bond Facility Capped Muni-Treasury Yield Spreads in the Covid-19 Recession
28437.zh_title: 新美联储市政债券工具如何在新冠疫情衰退中限制市政债券与国债收益率利差
28437.authors: Michael D. Bordo, John V. Duca
28437.abstract: For over two centuries, the municipal bond market has been a source of systemic risk, which returned early in the Covid-19 downturn when borrowing from securities markets became costly for many private and public entities, and some found it difficult to borrow at all. Indeed, just before the Fed announced its unprecedented intervention into the municipal (muni) bond market, spreads of muni over Treasury yields rose in line with the unemployment rate and appeared headed to levels not seen since the Great Depression, when real municipal gross investment plunged 35 percent below 1929 levels. To prevent a repeat, the Fed created the Municipal Liquidity Facility (MLF) to purchase newly issued, (near) investment grade state and local government bonds at normal ratings-based interest rate spreads over Treasury bonds plus a fee of 100 basis points, later reduced to 50 basis points. Despite a modest take-up, the MLF has effectively capped muni spreads at near normal levels plus the Fed fee and limited the extent to which interest rate spreads could have amplified the impact of the Covid pandemic. To establish the MLF the Fed needed Treasury indemnification against default losses. There are concerns about whether the creation of the MLF could undermine the efficiency of the bond market if the facility lasts too long and could induce moral hazard among borrowers. How the MLF will be unwound will affect these downside aspects and help answer the question whether the program’s benefits exceed its costs.
28437.zh_abstract: 两个多世纪以来，市政债券市场一直是系统性风险的来源，这在新冠疫情衰退初期再次出现，当时许多私人和公共实体从证券市场借款成本高昂，有些甚至难以借款。事实上，就在美联储宣布对市政债券市场进行前所未有的干预之前，市政债券相对于国债的收益率利差随着失业率上升而扩大，似乎正朝着大萧条以来从未见过的水平发展，当时市政实际总投资比1929年水平暴跌了35%。为防止重演，美联储创建了市政流动性便利，以正常的基于评级的国债利率利差加上100个基点（后来降至50个基点）的费用购买新发行的（接近）投资级州和地方政府债券。尽管使用量不大，但市政流动性便利有效地将市政债券利差限制在接近正常水平加上美联储费用的范围内，并限制了利率利差可能放大新冠疫情冲击的程度。为建立市政流动性便利，美联储需要财政部对违约损失进行赔偿。有人担心，如果该工具持续时间过长，市政流动性便利的创建可能会削弱债券市场的效率，并可能引发借款人的道德风险。市政流动性便利将如何退出将影响这些负面方面，并有助于回答该计划的收益是否超过成本的问题。

28436.title: Using Monotonicity Restrictions to Identify Models with Partially Latent Covariates
28436.zh_title: 利用单调性约束识别含部分潜变量协变量的模型
28436.authors: Minji Bang, Wayne Gao, Andrew Postlewaite, Holger Sieg
28436.abstract: This paper develops a new method for identifying econometric models with partially latent covariates. Such data structures arise naturally in industrial organization and labor economics settings where data are collected using an “input-based sampling” strategy, e.g., if the sampling unit is one of multiple labor input factors. We show that the latent covariates can be nonparametrically identified, if they are functions of a common shock satisfying some plausible monotonicity assumptions. With the latent covariates identified, semiparametric estimation of the outcome equation proceeds within a standard IV framework that accounts for the endogeneity of the covariates. We illustrate the usefulness of our method using two applications. The first focuses on pharmacies: we find that production function differences between chains and independent pharmacies may partially explain the observed transformation of the industry structure. Our second application investigates education achievement functions and illustrates important differences in child investments between married and divorced couples.
28436.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种识别含有部分潜变量协变量的计量经济学模型的新方法。这种数据结构在产业组织和劳动经济学中自然出现，当数据采用“基于投入的抽样”策略收集时，例如抽样单位是多种劳动投入要素之一。我们证明，如果潜变量是满足某些合理单调性假设的共同冲击的函数，则它们可以被非参数识别。在潜变量被识别后，结果方程的半参数估计在标准的工具变量框架内进行，该框架考虑了协变量的内生性。我们通过两个应用来说明我们方法的实用性。第一个应用聚焦于药店：我们发现连锁药店与独立药店之间的生产函数差异可能部分解释了观察到的行业结构转型。第二个应用研究了教育成就函数，并揭示了已婚夫妇与离异夫妇在子女投资上的重要差异。
28436.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR, TWP；JEL：C01, J24, L0

28435.title: The Unholy Trinity: Regulatory Forbearance, Stressed Banks and Zombie Firms
28435.zh_title: 不洁的三位一体：监管宽容、受困银行与僵尸企业
28435.authors: Anusha Chari, Lakshita Jain, Nirupama Kulkarni
28435.abstract: During the global financial crisis, the Reserve Bank of India enacted forbearance measures that lowered capital provisioning rates for loans under temporary liquidity stress. Matched bank-firm data reveal that troubled banks took advantage of the policy to also shield firms facing serious solvency issues. Perversely, in industries and bank portfolios with high proportions of failing firms, credit to healthy firms declined and was reallocated to the weakest firms. By incentivizing banks to hide true asset quality, the forbearance policy provided a license for regulatory arbitrage. The build-up of stressed assets in India’s predominantly state-owned banking system is consistent with accounting subterfuge.
28435.zh_abstract: 在全球金融危机期间，印度储备银行实施了宽容措施，降低了临时流动性压力下贷款的资本拨备率。匹配的银行-企业数据显示，陷入困境的银行利用该政策也庇护了面临严重偿付能力问题的企业。反常的是，在失败企业比例高的行业和银行投资组合中，对健康企业的信贷减少，并重新分配给最弱的企业。通过激励银行隐藏真实资产质量，宽容政策为监管套利提供了许可。印度以国有为主的银行体系中压力资产的积累与会计造假是一致的。
28435.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E58, G21, G28

28434.title: A Parsimonious Behavioral SEIR Model of the 2020 COVID Epidemic in the United States and the United Kingdom
28434.zh_title: 2020年美国与英国COVID疫情的简约行为SEIR模型
28434.abstract: I present a behavioral epidemiological model of the evolution of the COVID epidemic in the United States and the United Kingdom over the past 12 months. The model includes the introduction of a new, more contagious variant in the UK in early fall and the US in mid December. The model is behavioral in that activity, and thus transmission, responds endogenously to the daily death rate. I show that with only seasonal variation in the transmission rate and pandemic fatigue modeled as a one-time reduction in the semi-elasticity of the transmission rate to the daily death rate late in the year, the model can reproduce the evolution of daily and cumulative COVID deaths in the both countries from Feb 15, 2020 to the present remarkably well. I find that most of the end-of-year surge in deaths in both the US and the UK was generated by pandemic fatigue and not the new variant of the virus. I then generate fore- casts for the evolution of the epidemic over the next two years with continuing seasonality, pandemic fatigue, and spread of the new variant.
28434.zh_abstract: 我提出了一个行为流行病学模型，用于描述过去12个月美国与英国COVID疫情的演变。该模型包括在初秋引入英国、12月中旬引入美国的一种新的、更具传染性的变种。该模型是行为性的，因为活动（从而传播）会内生地对每日死亡率做出反应。我表明，仅通过传播率的季节性变化以及将疫情疲劳建模为年末传播率对每日死亡率的半弹性的一次性降低，该模型就能非常好地再现从2020年2月15日至今两国每日和累计COVID死亡人数的演变。我发现，美国和英国年末死亡人数激增的大部分是由疫情疲劳引起的，而不是病毒的新变种。然后，我生成了未来两年疫情演变的预测，其中考虑了持续的季节性、疫情疲劳和新变种的传播。

28433.title: O-Ring Production Networks
28433.authors: Banu Demir, Ana Cecília Fieler, Daniel Xu, Kelly Kaili Yang
28433.abstract: We study a production network where quality choices are interconnected across firms. High-quality firms are skill intensive and trade more with other high-quality firms. Using data from Turkish firms, we document strong assortative matching of skills in the production network. A firm-specific export demand shock from a rich country increases the firm's skill intensity and shifts the firm toward skill-intensive domestic partners. We develop a quantitative model with heterogeneous firms, endogenous quality choices, and network formation. An economy-wide export demand shock of 5 percent induces exporters and non-exporters to upgrade quality, raising the average wage by 1.2 percent. This effect is about nine times the effect in a special case of the model with no interconnection of quality choices.
28433.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个质量选择在企业间相互关联的生产网络。高质量企业是技能密集型的，并且与其他高质量企业进行更多贸易。利用土耳其企业的数据，我们记录了生产网络中技能强烈的分类匹配。来自富裕国家的企业特定出口需求冲击增加了该企业的技能密集度，并使其转向技能密集型的国内合作伙伴。我们开发了一个包含异质性企业、内生质量选择和网络形成的定量模型。一个全经济范围的5%出口需求冲击促使出口商和非出口商升级质量，使平均工资提高1.2%。这个效应大约是质量选择无相互关联的模型特例中效应的九倍。

28432.title: Is There A Replication Crisis In Finance?
28432.zh_title: 金融学存在复制危机吗？
28432.authors: Theis Ingerslev Jensen, Bryan T. Kelly, Lasse Heje Pedersen
28432.abstract: Several papers argue that financial economics faces a replication crisis because the majority of studies cannot be replicated or are the result of multiple testing of too many factors. We develop and estimate a Bayesian model of factor replication, which leads to different conclusions. The majority of asset pricing factors: (1) can be replicated, (2) can be clustered into 13 themes, the majority of which are significant parts of the tangency portfolio, (3) work out-of-sample in a new large data set covering 93 countries, and (4) have evidence that is strengthened (not weakened) by the large number of observed factors.
28432.zh_abstract: 几篇论文认为金融经济学面临复制危机，因为大多数研究无法被复制，或者是过多因子多重检验的结果。我们开发并估计了一个因子复制的贝叶斯模型，得出了不同的结论。大多数资产定价因子：(1) 可以被复制，(2) 可以聚类为13个主题，其中大部分是切点组合的重要组成部分，(3) 在覆盖93个国家的新大数据集中具有样本外表现，并且 (4) 其证据因观察到的因子数量众多而得到加强（而非削弱）。
28432.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C11, C58, G02, G10, G11, G12, G15, G17

28431.title: Man Versus Machine? Self-Reports Versus Algorithmic Measurement of Publications
28431.zh_title: 人还是机器？自我报告与算法测量的出版物比较
28431.authors: Xuan Jiang, Wan-Ying Chang, Bruce A. Weinberg
28431.abstract: This paper uses newly available data from Web of Science on publications matched to researchers in Survey of Doctorate Recipients to compare scientific publications collected by surveys and algorithmic approaches. We aim to illustrate the different types of measurement errors in self-reported and machine-generated data by estimating how publication measures from the two approaches are related to career outcomes (e.g. salaries, placements, and faculty rankings). We find that the potential biases in the self-reports are smaller relative to the algorithmic data. Moreover, the errors in the two approaches are quite intuitive: the measurement errors of the algorithmic data are mainly due to the accuracy of matching, which primarily depends on the frequency of names and the data that was available to make matches; while the noise in self reports is expected to increase over the career as researchers’ publication records become more complex, harder to recall, and less immediately relevant for career progress. This paper provides methodological suggestion on evaluating the quality and advantages of two approaches to data construction. It also provides guidance on how to use the new linked data.
28431.zh_abstract: 本文利用Web of Science新提供的、与博士获得者调查中研究者匹配的出版物数据，比较了通过调查和算法方法收集的科学出版物。我们旨在通过估计两种方法得出的出版物度量与职业结果（如薪资、职位和教师排名）的关系，来说明自我报告数据和机器生成数据中不同类型的测量误差。我们发现，与算法数据相比，自我报告中的潜在偏差较小。此外，两种方法中的误差相当直观：算法数据的测量误差主要源于匹配的准确性，这主要取决于姓名的频率以及可用于进行匹配的数据；而自我报告中的噪声预计会随着职业生涯的推进而增加，因为研究人员的发表记录变得更加复杂、更难回忆，并且与职业进展的直接相关性降低。本文为评估两种数据构建方法的质量和优势提供了方法论建议，并为如何使用新的关联数据提供了指导。

28430.title: Time Aggregation in Health Insurance Deductibles
28430.zh_title: 健康保险免赔额的时间聚合
28430.abstract: Health insurance plans increasingly pay for expenses only beyond a large annual deductible. This paper explores the implications of deductibles that reset over shorter timespans. We develop a model of insurance demand between two actuarially equivalent deductible policies, in which one deductible is larger and resets annually and the other deductible is smaller and resets biannually. Our model incorporates borrowing constraints, moral hazard, mid-year contract switching, and delayable care. Calibrations using claims data show that the liquidity benefits of resetting deductibles can generate welfare gains of 3-10% of premium costs, particularly for individuals with borrowing constraints.
28430.zh_abstract: 健康保险计划越来越多地只支付超过大额年度免赔额的费用。本文探讨了在更短时间跨度内重置免赔额的含义。我们建立了一个在两种精算等价的免赔额保单之间的保险需求模型，其中一种免赔额较大且每年重置，另一种免赔额较小且每两年重置。我们的模型包含了借贷约束、道德风险、年中合同转换以及可延迟的医疗服务。使用索赔数据的校准表明，重置免赔额的流动性收益可以产生相当于保费成本3-10%的福利收益，特别是对于有借贷约束的个人而言。
28430.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：D15, D81, G22, G52, I13

28429.title: Data-Driven Incentive Alignment in Capitation Schemes
28429.zh_title: 按人头付费方案中的数据驱动激励对齐
28429.abstract: This paper explores whether Big Data, taking the form of extensive high dimensional records, can reduce the cost of adverse selection by private service providers in government-run capitation schemes, such as Medicare Advantage. We argue that using data to improve the ex ante precision of capitation regressions is unlikely to be helpful. Even if types become essentially observable, the high dimensionality of covariates makes it infeasible to precisely estimate the cost of serving a given type: Big Data makes types observable, but not necessarily interpretable. This gives an informed private operator scope to select types that are relatively cheap to serve. Instead, we argue that data can be used to align incentives by forming unbiased and non-manipulable ex post estimates of a private operator’s gains from selection.
28429.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了大数据（以广泛的高维记录形式）是否能够降低政府运营的按人头付费方案（如医疗保险优势计划）中私人服务提供商逆向选择的成本。我们认为，利用数据来提高按人头付费回归的事前精度不太可能有帮助。即使类型变得本质上可观察，协变量的高维性使得精确估计服务特定类型的成本变得不可行：大数据使类型可观察，但不一定可解释。这为知情的私人运营商提供了选择服务成本相对较低的类型的机会。相反，我们认为，数据可以通过形成对私人运营商选择收益的无偏且不可操纵的事后估计来用于对齐激励。
28429.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：C55, D82, H51, I11, I13

28428.title: The Effects of Negative Equity on Children’s Educational Outcomes
28428.zh_title: 负资产对儿童教育成果的影响
28428.authors: Vicki Been, Ingrid Ellen, David N. Figlio, Ashlyn Nelson, Stephen Ross, Amy Ellen Schwartz, Leanna Stiefel
28428.abstract: This study examines the effects of negative equity on children’s academic performance, using data on children attending Florida public schools and housing transactions from the State of Florida. Our empirical strategy exploits variation over time in the timing of family moves to Florida in order to account for household sorting into neighborhoods and schools and selection into initial mortgage terms. In contrast to the existing literature on foreclosure and children’s outcomes, we find that Florida students with the highest risk of negative equity exhibit significantly higher test score growth. These effects are largest among Black students and students who qualify for free or reduced-priced lunch. We find evidence supporting two underlying mechanisms: (1) consumption patterns suggest that families in negative equity may reduce the impact of income losses on consumption by forgoing mortgage payments, and (2) mobility patterns suggest that families exposed to high levels of negative equity may move to schools that are of higher quality on average. While negative equity and foreclosure are undesirable, the changing incentives in terms of mortgage delinquency may have helped families manage the economic shocks caused by the great recession, as well as temporarily reduced the housing market barriers faced by low income households when attempting to access educational opportunities.
28428.zh_abstract: 本研究利用佛罗里达州公立学校儿童的数据以及该州的住房交易数据，考察了负资产对儿童学业表现的影响。我们的实证策略利用了家庭迁入佛罗里达州时间上的变化，以解释家庭对社区和学校的选择以及初始抵押贷款条款的自我选择。与现有关于止赎和儿童成果的文献相反，我们发现佛罗里达州负资产风险最高的学生表现出显著更高的考试成绩增长。这些影响在黑人学生和符合免费或减价午餐资格的学生中最大。我们找到了支持两种潜在机制的证据：（1）消费模式表明，负资产家庭可能通过放弃抵押贷款支付来减少收入损失对消费的影响；（2）流动性模式表明，面临高负资产水平的家庭可能迁往平均质量更高的学校。尽管负资产和止赎是不可取的，但抵押贷款违约方面激励的变化可能帮助家庭管理了大衰退造成的经济冲击，并暂时降低了低收入家庭在寻求教育机会时面临的住房市场障碍。

28427.title: A Model of the Data Economy
28427.abstract: In a data economy, transactions of goods and services generate information, which is stored, traded and depreciates. How are the economics of this economy different from traditional production or innovation economies? How do these differences matter for measurement of GDP, firm values, depreciation rates, welfare and externalities? Despite incorporating active experimentation and data as an intangible asset, we devise a tractable recursive representation. Because the resulting model maps to many observable macro and finance measures, it can be calibrated and estimated like its old-economy DSGE counterpart. The model also delivers insights: It rationalizes why apps are often “free,” why firm size is diverging and why even non-digital economic activity might be greater than GDP suggests.
28427.zh_abstract: 在数据经济中，商品和服务的交易会产生信息，这些信息被存储、交易并折旧。这种经济的经济学与传统生产或创新经济有何不同？这些差异如何影响GDP、企业价值、折旧率、福利和外部性的衡量？尽管包含了主动实验和数据作为无形资产，我们设计了一个易于处理的递归表示。由于由此产生的模型映射到许多可观测的宏观和金融指标，它可以像旧经济DSGE对应模型一样进行校准和估计。该模型还提供了见解：它解释了为什么应用程序通常是“免费的”，为什么企业规模在分化，以及为什么即使是非数字经济活动也可能大于GDP所显示的。

28426.title: The Macroeconomics of Financial Speculation
28426.zh_title: 金融投机的宏观经济学
28426.abstract: I review the literature on financial speculation driven by belief disagreements from a macro- economics perspective. To highlight unifying themes, I develop a stylized macroeconomic model that embeds several mechanisms. With short-selling constraints, speculation can generate over- valuation and speculative bubbles. Leverage can substantially inflate speculative bubbles and leverage limits depend on perceived downside risks. Shifts in beliefs about downside tail scenarios can explain the emergence and the collapse of leveraged speculative bubbles. Speculative bubbles are related to rational bubbles, but they match better the empirical evidence on the predictability of asset returns. Even without short-selling constraints, speculation induces pro- cyclical asset valuation. When speculation affects the price of aggregate assets, it also influences macroeconomic outcomes such as aggregate consumption, investment, and output. Speculation in the boom years reduces asset prices, aggregate demand, and output in the subsequent recession. Macroprudential policies that restrict speculation in the boom can improve macroeconomic stability and social welfare.
28426.zh_abstract: 我从宏观经济学的角度回顾了关于由信念分歧驱动的金融投机的文献。为了突出统一主题，我构建了一个嵌入多种机制的风格化宏观经济模型。在卖空约束下，投机可能导致估值过高和投机泡沫。杠杆可以大幅膨胀投机泡沫，而杠杆限制取决于感知的下行风险。关于尾部下行情景的信念转变可以解释杠杆投机泡沫的出现和崩溃。投机泡沫与理性泡沫相关，但它们更符合资产回报可预测性的经验证据。即使没有卖空约束，投机也会导致资产估值的顺周期性。当投机影响总资产价格时，它也会影响宏观经济结果，如总消费、投资和产出。繁荣时期的投机会降低资产价格、总需求和随后的衰退中的产出。限制繁荣时期投机的宏观审慎政策可以改善宏观经济稳定和社会福利。
28426.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E00, E12, E21, E22, E32, E44, E50, E70, G00, G01, G11, G12, G40

28425.title: Partisanship and Fiscal Policy in Economic Unions: Evidence from U.S. States
28425.zh_title: 经济联盟中的党派偏见与财政政策：来自美国各州的证据
28425.authors: Gerald Carlino, Thorsten Drautzburg, Robert P. Inman, Nicholas Zarra
28425.abstract: Partisanship of state level politicians affect the impact of federal fiscal policy in the U.S. Using data from close gubernatorial elections, we find partisan differences in the marginal propensity to spend federal transfers since the early 1980's: Republican governors spend less. A New Keynesian model of partisan states in a monetary union implies sizable aggregate income effects from these partisan differences. First, the transfer multiplier would rise by 0.60 if Republican governors were to spend as much from federal aid as do Democratic governors. Second, the observed changes in the share of Republican governors imply variation in the fiscal multiplier of 0.40. Local projection regressions support this prediction.
28425.zh_abstract: 州级政治家的党派偏见会影响美国联邦财政政策的效果。利用州长选举中势均力敌的数据，我们发现自20世纪80年代初以来，在支出联邦转移支付的边际倾向上存在党派差异：共和党州长支出较少。一个包含货币联盟中党派州的新凯恩斯主义模型表明，这些党派差异会产生显著的总体收入效应。首先，如果共和党州长像民主党州长那样从联邦援助中支出，转移支付乘数将上升0.60。其次，观察到的共和党州长份额变化意味着财政乘数变化0.40。局部投影回归支持这一预测。
28425.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL；JEL：C24, E62, F45, H72, H74, H77

28424.title: Earnings Inequality in Production Networks
28424.zh_title: 生产网络中的收入不平等
28424.authors: Federico Huneeus, Kory Kroft, Kevin Lim
28424.abstract: Why do firms differ in the wages paid to otherwise identical workers and in the share of revenue that they allocate to labor? This paper explores the role of production networks. Using linked employer-employee and firm-to-firm trade transactions data from Chile, we show that firms with better access to both buyers and suppliers of intermediate inputs tend to have higher earnings premia and lower labor shares. Motivated by these facts, we develop and estimate a model with labor market power, worker and firm heterogeneity, and heterogeneity in firm-to-firm linkages in the production network. Greater access to larger buyers and more efficient suppliers raises the marginal revenue product of labor and lowers the relative cost of intermediates to labor. This leads to higher wages in the presence of labor market power and lower labor shares when labor and materials are substitutes. Through counterfactual simulations of the estimated model we find a substantial role for production networks in explaining the variances of earnings premia and labor shares across firms.
28424.zh_abstract: 为什么企业在支付给相同工人的工资以及分配给劳动力的收入份额上存在差异？本文探讨了生产网络的作用。利用智利的关联雇主-雇员和企业间贸易交易数据，我们表明，对中间投入品的买家和供应商都有更好准入的企业往往具有更高的收入溢价和更低的劳动份额。受这些事实的启发，我们开发并估计了一个包含劳动力市场力量、工人和企业异质性以及生产网络中企业间联系异质性的模型。对更大买家更优的准入和更高效供应商的准入提高了劳动力的边际收入产品，并降低了中间品相对于劳动力的相对成本。在存在劳动力市场力量的情况下，这导致更高的工资，而当劳动力和材料是替代品时，则导致更低的劳动份额。通过估计模型的反事实模拟，我们发现生产网络在解释企业间收入溢价和劳动份额的差异方面发挥了重要作用。
28424.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：F0, F12, F16, J0, J31, J42

28423.title: From Micro to Macro Development
28423.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Joseph P. Kaboski, Robert M. Townsend
28423.abstract: Macroeconomic development remains an important policy goal because of its ability to lift entire populations out of poverty. In our review of the literature, we emphasize that the best way to achieve this objective is to embrace a synthesis of methods and ideas, with the science of experiments as a unifying feature. RCTs need representative data and structural modeling, and macro models need to be designed and disciplined to the realities and data of developing country economies. Macroeconomic models have key lessons for gathering and analyzing micro evidence and for moving to an evaluation of macro policy. Resource constraints, heterogeneity, general equilibrium effects, obstacles to trade, dynamics, and returns to scale can all play key roles. A synthesis for macro development is well under way.
28423.zh_abstract: 宏观经济发展仍然是一个重要的政策目标，因为它能够使整个群体摆脱贫困。在我们对文献的回顾中，我们强调实现这一目标的最佳方式是拥抱方法和思想的综合，以实验科学作为统一特征。随机对照试验需要代表性数据和结构建模，而宏观模型需要根据发展中国家的现实和数据来设计和约束。宏观经济模型为收集和分析微观证据以及转向宏观政策评估提供了关键教训。资源约束、异质性、一般均衡效应、贸易障碍、动态和规模报酬都可能发挥关键作用。宏观发展的综合正在顺利进行中。

28472.title: The Economics of Immense Risk, Urgent Action and Radical Change: Towards New Approaches to the Economics of Climate Change
28472.zh_title: 巨大风险、紧急行动与根本变革的经济学：迈向气候变化经济学的新方法
28472.authors: Nicholas Stern, Joseph E. Stiglitz, Charlotte Taylor
28472.abstract: Designing policy for climate change requires analyses which integrate the interrelationship between the economy and the environment. We argue that, despite their dominance in the economics literature and influence in public discussion and policymaking, the methodology employed by Integrated Assessment Models (IAMs) rests on flawed foundations, which become particularly relevant in relation to the realities of the immense risks and challenges of climate change, and the radical changes in our economies that a sound and effective response require. We identify a set of critical methodological problems with the IAMs which limit their usefulness and discuss the analytic foundations of an alternative approach that is more capable of providing insights into how best to manage the transition to net-zero emissions.
28472.zh_abstract: 设计气候变化政策需要整合经济与环境相互关系的分析。我们认为，尽管综合评估模型在经济学文献中占据主导地位，并在公共讨论和政策制定中具有影响力，但其方法论建立在有缺陷的基础上，这在面对气候变化巨大风险和挑战的现实，以及有效应对所需的根本性经济变革时尤为突出。我们指出了综合评估模型的一系列关键方法论问题，这些限制了其有用性，并讨论了一种替代方法的分析基础，该方法更能为如何最好地管理向净零排放转型提供见解。

28471.title: Does Marijuana Legalization Affect Work Capacity? Evidence from Workers’ Compensation Benefits
28471.zh_title: 大麻合法化会影响工作能力吗？来自工人赔偿福利的证据
28471.authors: Rahi Abouk, Keshar M. Ghimire, Johanna Catherine Maclean, David Powell
28471.abstract: We study the effect of state recreational marijuana laws (RMLs) on workers’ compensation (WC) benefit receipt among adults 40-62 years. We find that WC receipt declines in response to RML adoption both in terms of the propensity to receive benefits and benefit amount. We estimate complementary declines in non-traumatic workplace injury rates and the incidence of work-limiting disabilities. We offer evidence that the primary driver of these reductions is an improvement in work capacity, likely due to access to an additional form of pain management therapy.
28471.zh_abstract: 我们研究了州级娱乐用大麻法对40-62岁成年人工人赔偿福利领取的影响。我们发现，在采用娱乐用大麻法后，工人赔偿福利的领取在领取倾向和福利金额两方面均有所下降。我们估计，非创伤性工伤事故率和工作限制性残疾的发生率也出现了互补性的下降。我们提供的证据表明，这些减少的主要驱动因素是工作能力的改善，这很可能归因于获得了一种额外的疼痛管理疗法。

28470.title: Aggregate Employment Effects of Unemployment Benefits During Deep Downturns: Evidence from the Expiration of the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation
28470.zh_title: 深度衰退期间失业救济金的总体就业效应：来自联邦大流行失业补偿计划到期的证据
28470.abstract: The expiration of the temporary $\$600$ boost to weekly UI benefits under the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation (FPUC) led to a sharp, unprecedented, 98 percentage point reduction (on average) in the replacement rate during a time when employment was recovering during the Covid recession. Leveraging the considerable variation in this drop across states, I use a difference-in-differences event study design to estimate the macro employment effects. I find little impact of job gains from the benefit reduction, especially when I focus on groups (non-college graduates, and those from non-high-income households) that comprise of most UI recipients. The estimates rule out job gains implied by much of the micro UI duration elasticities from the existing literature.
28470.zh_abstract: 联邦大流行失业补偿计划下每周600美元失业保险金临时增加的到期，导致替代率平均急剧下降了98个百分点，而此时正值新冠衰退期间就业复苏之际。利用各州之间这种下降的巨大差异，我采用双重差分事件研究设计来估计宏观就业效应。我发现，福利减少带来的就业增长影响很小，尤其是当我关注构成大多数失业保险金领取者的群体（非大学毕业生和非高收入家庭人群）时。这些估计排除了现有文献中许多微观失业保险持续时间弹性所隐含的就业增长。

28469.title: Auto-Enrollment Retirement Plans for the People: Choices and Outcomes in OregonSaves
28469.zh_title: 面向大众的自动注册退休计划：俄勒冈储蓄计划中的选择与结果
28469.authors: John Chalmers, Olivia S. Mitchell, Jonathan Reuter, Mingli Zhong
28469.abstract: Oregon recently launched an automatic-enrollment retirement savings program for private sector workers lacking access to other workplace retirement plans. We analyze participation choices, account balances, and inflow/outflow data using administrative records between August 2018 and April 2020. Within the small to mid-sized firms served by OregonSaves, estimated average after-tax earnings are low ($\$2,365$ per month) and turnover rates are high (38.2% per year). Younger employees and employees in larger firms are less likely to opt out, but participation rates fall over time. The most common reason given for opting out is “I can’t afford to save at this time,” but the second most common is “I have my own retirement plan.” As of April 2020, 67,731 accounts had positive account balances, holding $\$51.1$ million in total assets. The average balance is $\$754,$ but with considerable dispersion; younger workers accumulating the fewest assets due to higher job turnover. Overall, we conclude that OregonSaves has meaningfully increased employee savings by reducing search costs. The 34.3% of workers with positive account balances in April 2020 is comparable to the marginal increase in participation at larger firms in the private sector. Employees opting out of OregonSaves are often doing so for rational reasons.
