28469.zh_abstract: 俄勒冈州近期推出了一项自动注册退休储蓄计划，面向无法参与其他工作场所退休计划的私营部门员工。我们利用2018年8月至2020年4月间的行政记录，分析了参与选择、账户余额以及资金流入/流出数据。在俄勒冈储蓄计划服务的中小型企业中，估计的平均税后收入较低（每月2365美元），而离职率较高（每年38.2%）。年轻员工和大型企业员工更不容易选择退出，但参与率随时间推移而下降。选择退出的最常见理由是“目前我负担不起储蓄”，但第二常见的理由是“我有自己的退休计划”。截至2020年4月，共有67731个账户拥有正余额，持有总资产5110万美元。平均余额为754美元，但分布相当分散；年轻工人因工作更替频繁而积累的资产最少。总体而言，我们得出结论，俄勒冈储蓄计划通过降低搜索成本，显著提高了员工储蓄。2020年4月拥有正账户余额的工人比例为34.3%，这与私营部门大型企业参与率的边际增长相当。选择退出俄勒冈储蓄计划的员工通常出于理性原因。

28468.title: Reparations and Persistent Racial Wealth Gaps
28468.zh_title: 赔偿与持续存在的种族财富差距
28468.abstract: We analyze the magnitude and persistence of the racial wealth gap using a long-run model of heterogeneous dynasties with an occupational choice and bequests. Our innovation is to introduce endogenous beliefs about risky returns, reflecting differences in dynasties' investment experiences over time. Feeding the exclusion of Black dynasties from labor and capital markets into the model as the only driving force, we find that the model quantitatively reproduces current and historical racial gaps in wealth, income, entrepreneurship, mobility, and beliefs about risky returns. We explore how the future trajectory of the racial wealth gap might change in response to various policies. Wealth transfers to all Black dynasties that eliminate the average wealth gap today do not lead to long-run wealth convergence. The logic is that centuries-long exclusions lead Black dynasties to hold pessimistic beliefs about risky returns and to forgo investment opportunities after the wealth transfer. Investment subsidies toward Black entrepreneurs are more effective than wealth transfers in permanently eliminating the racial wealth gap.
28468.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含职业选择和遗产的长期异质性王朝模型，分析了种族财富差距的规模和持续性。我们的创新之处在于引入了关于风险回报的内生信念，反映了不同王朝随时间推移的投资经验差异。将黑人王朝被排除在劳动力和资本市场之外作为模型中唯一的驱动因素，我们发现该模型定量地再现了当前和历史在财富、收入、创业、流动性以及关于风险回报信念方面的种族差距。我们探讨了种族财富差距的未来轨迹可能如何因各种政策而改变。向所有黑人王朝进行财富转移以消除当前的平均财富差距，并不会导致长期的财富趋同。其逻辑在于，长达几个世纪的排斥导致黑人王朝对风险回报持有悲观信念，并在财富转移后放弃投资机会。与财富转移相比，针对黑人企业家的投资补贴在永久消除种族财富差距方面更为有效。
28468.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D31, E21, J15

28467.title: China’s War on Pollution: Evidence from the First Five Years
28467.zh_title: 中国的污染防治战：前五年的证据
28467.authors: Michael Greenstone, Guojun He, Shanjun Li, Eric Zou
28467.abstract: The decade from 2010 to 2019 marked a significant turning point in China’s history of environmental regulation and pollution. This article describes the recent trends in air and water quality, with a focus on the five years since China declared a “war on pollution” in 2014. It summarizes the emerging literature that has taken advantage of accompanying improvements in data availability and accuracy to document sharp improvements in environmental quality, especially local air pollution, and understand their social, economic, and health consequences.
28467.zh_abstract: 2010年至2019年的十年标志着中国环境监管和污染历史上的一个重要转折点。本文描述了近期空气和水质的变化趋势，重点关注自2014年中国宣布“污染防治战”以来的五年。文章总结了利用伴随而来的数据可用性和准确性改善的新兴文献，这些文献记录了环境质量，特别是局部空气污染的显著改善，并理解了其社会、经济和健康后果。

28466.title: The Economic Geography of Global Warming
28466.zh_title: 全球变暖的经济地理学
28466.abstract: Global warming is a worldwide and protracted phenomenon with heterogeneous local economic effects. In order to evaluate the aggregate and local economic consequences of higher temperatures, we propose a dynamic economic assessment model of the world economy with high spatial resolution. Our model features a number of mechanisms through which individuals can adapt to global warming, including costly trade and migration, and local technological innovations and natality rates. We quantify the model at a 1° × 1° resolution and estimate damage functions that determine the impact of temperature changes on a region’s fundamental productivity and amenities depending on local temperatures. Our baseline results show welfare losses as large as 15% in parts of Africa and Latin America but also high heterogeneity across locations, with northern regions in Siberia, Canada, and Alaska experiencing gains. Our results indicate large uncertainty about average welfare effects and point to migration and, to a lesser extent, innovation as important adaptation mechanisms. We use the model to assess the impact of carbon taxes, abatement technologies, and clean energy subsidies. Carbon taxes delay consumption of fossil fuels and help flatten the temperature curve but are much more effective when an abatement technology is forthcoming.
28466.zh_abstract: 全球变暖是一种全球性且长期的现象，具有异质性的地方经济影响。为了评估气温升高的总体和地方经济后果，我们提出了一个具有高空间分辨率的世界经济动态经济评估模型。我们的模型包含了一系列个人可以适应全球变暖的机制，包括有成本的贸易和移民，以及地方技术创新和出生率。我们以1°×1°的分辨率量化了该模型，并估计了损害函数，该函数根据当地温度确定温度变化对地区基本生产力和宜居性的影响。我们的基线结果显示，非洲和拉丁美洲部分地区福利损失高达15%，但不同地点之间存在高度异质性，西伯利亚、加拿大和阿拉斯加的北部地区则出现收益。我们的结果表明，平均福利效应存在很大的不确定性，并指出移民以及较小程度上的创新是重要的适应机制。我们利用该模型评估了碳税、减排技术和清洁能源补贴的影响。碳税延迟了化石燃料的消费，并有助于平缓温度曲线，但当减排技术即将出现时，其效果要大得多。
28466.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, ITI；JEL：F63, F64, Q51, Q54, Q56

28465.title: Learning from Shared News: When Abundant Information Leads to Belief Polarization
28465.zh_title: 从共享新闻中学习：当信息丰富导致信念极化时
28465.authors: Renee Bowen, Danil Dmitriev, Simone Galperti
28465.abstract: We study learning via shared news. Each period agents receive the same quantity and quality of first-hand information and can share it with friends. Some friends (possibly few) share selectively, generating heterogeneous news diets across agents akin to echo chambers. Agents are aware of selective sharing and update beliefs by Bayes' rule. Contrary to standard learning results, we show that beliefs can diverge in this environment leading to polarization. This requires that (i) agents hold misperceptions (even minor) about friends' sharing and (ii) information quality is sufficiently low. Polarization can worsen when agents' social connections expand. When the quantity of first-hand information becomes large, agents can hold opposite extreme beliefs resulting in severe polarization. We find that news aggregators can curb polarization caused by news sharing. Our results hold without media bias or fake news, so eliminating these is not sufficient to reduce polarization. When fake news is included, it can lead to polarization but only through misperceived selective sharing. We apply our theory to shed light on the evolution of public opinions about climate change in the US.
28465.zh_abstract: 我们研究通过共享新闻进行学习。每个时期，代理人获得相同数量和质量的第一手信息，并可以与朋友分享。一些朋友（可能很少）有选择性地分享，导致代理人之间产生类似于回音室的异质性新闻食谱。代理人意识到选择性分享，并通过贝叶斯规则更新信念。与标准学习结果相反，我们表明在这种环境下信念可能分化，导致极化。这需要满足以下条件：（i）代理人对朋友的分享存在误解（即使是轻微的），以及（ii）信息质量足够低。当代理人的社交联系扩大时，极化可能会恶化。当第一手信息的数量变得很大时，代理人可能持有相反的极端信念，导致严重的极化。我们发现新闻聚合器可以抑制由新闻分享引起的极化。我们的结果在没有媒体偏见或假新闻的情况下成立，因此消除这些因素并不足以减少极化。当包含假新闻时，它可能导致极化，但只能通过被误解的选择性分享来实现。我们应用我们的理论来揭示美国关于气候变化公众舆论的演变。

28464.title: The Analytic Theory of a Monetary Shock
28464.abstract: We propose an analytical method to analyze the propagation of a once-and-for-all shock in a broad class of sticky price models. The method is based on the eigenvalue- eigenfunction representation of the dynamics of the cross-sectional distribution of firms’ desired adjustments. A key novelty is that, under assumptions that are appropriate for low-inflation economies, we can approximate the whole profile of the impulse response for any moment of interest in response to an aggregate shock (any displacement of the invariant distribution). We present several applications and discuss extensions.
28464.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种分析方法，用于分析一次性冲击在一大类粘性价格模型中的传播。该方法基于企业期望调整的横截面分布动态的特征值-特征函数表示。一个关键的新颖之处在于，在适用于低通胀经济的假设下，我们可以近似地得到任何感兴趣的矩在应对总冲击（对不变分布的任何位移）时的整个脉冲响应曲线。我们提出了几个应用并讨论了扩展。

28463.title: Gender Quotas and Support for Women in Board Elections
28463.zh_title: 性别配额与对董事会选举中女性的支持
28463.authors: Marina Gertsberg, Johanna Mollerstrom, Michaela Pagel
28463.abstract: We study shareholder support for corporate board nominees before and after the 2018 California gender quota. Pre-quota, new female nominees received greater support than new male nominees, consistent with women being held to a higher standard. Post-quota, as the number of women increased, support for new (mandated) female nominees decreased to the same level of, but not lower than, the support that new male nominees enjoy. Still, share prices reacted negatively to the quota. We show that this reaction was concentrated in firms that did not turn over their least-supported male directors when adding women to comply with the quota.
28463.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2018年加州性别配额前后股东对董事会提名人的支持情况。配额前，新的女性提名人比新的男性提名人获得了更大的支持，这与女性被要求更高标准的情况一致。配额后，随着女性人数的增加，对新的（强制性的）女性提名人的支持下降到与新的男性提名人享有的支持相同的水平，但并未低于该水平。尽管如此，股价对配额的反应是负面的。我们表明，这种反应集中在那些在增加女性以遵守配额时，没有替换其最不受支持的男性董事的公司。

28462.title: A Division of Laborers: Identity and Efficiency in India
28462.zh_title: 劳动者的分工：印度的身份与效率
28462.authors: Guilhem Cassan, Daniel Keniston, Tatjana Kleineberg
28462.abstract: Workers’ social identity affects their occupation, and therefore the structure and prosperity of the aggregate economy. We estimate a general equilibrium Roy model of this phenomenon in the Indian caste system, where work and identity are particularly intertwined. New data on occupation, wages, and caste’s traditional occupations and social status show that workers are over-represented in their traditional occupations and under-represented in socially higher or lower occupations. We consider counterfactuals removing castes’ hierarchical and occupational links. Despite more efficient human capital allocation, aggregate output gains are small–in some counterfactuals negative–due to weaker caste networks and reduced learning across generations.
28462.zh_abstract: 工人的社会身份影响其职业，从而影响整体经济的结构和繁荣。我们在印度种姓制度中估计了一个关于此现象的一般均衡罗伊模型，在该制度中，工作和身份尤其相互交织。关于职业、工资以及种姓的传统职业和社会地位的新数据显示，工人在其传统职业中代表性过高，而在社会地位更高或更低的职业中代表性不足。我们考虑了消除种姓等级和职业联系的假设情景。尽管人力资本配置更有效率，但由于种姓网络减弱和代际学习减少，总产出收益很小——在某些假设情景中甚至为负。
28462.meta: Programs：DEV, IFM, LS；JEL：E24, E71, J21, J62, O15

28461.title: The Work-from-Home Technology Boon and its Consequences
28461.zh_title: 居家办公技术的繁荣及其后果
28461.authors: Morris A. Davis, Andra C. Ghent, Jesse M. Gregory
28461.abstract: We study the impact of widespread adoption of work-from-home (WFH) technology using an equilibrium model where people choose where to live, how to allocate their time between working at home and at the office, and how much space to use in production. Motivated by cross-sectional evidence on WFH, we model WFH as a complement to work at the office. Simulations of the model indicate that the pandemic induced a large change to the relative productivity of WFH that substantially increased home prices and will permanently affect incomes, income inequality, and city structure.
28461.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个均衡模型研究了居家办公技术广泛采用的影响，在该模型中，人们选择居住地点、如何分配在家和办公室工作的时间，以及生产中使用的空间量。受关于居家办公的横截面证据的启发，我们将居家办公建模为办公室工作的补充。模型模拟表明，疫情引发了居家办公相对生产力的巨大变化，这大幅推高了房价，并将永久性地影响收入、收入不平等和城市结构。
28461.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS；JEL：O33, O41, R12, R33

28459.title: Asymmetric Information and Sovereign Debt: Theory Meets Mexican Data
28459.zh_title: 信息不对称与主权债务：理论与墨西哥数据的结合
28459.authors: Harold L. Cole, Daniel Neuhann, Guillermo Ordoñez
28459.abstract: Using a novel data set containing all bids by all bidders for Mexican government bonds from 2001 to 2017, we demonstrate that asymmetric information about default risk is a key determinant of primary market bond yields. Empirically, large bidders do not pay more for bonds than the average bidder but their bids are accepted more frequently. We construct a model where investors may differ in wealth, risk aversion, market power and information, and find that only heterogeneous information can qualitatively account for these patterns. Moreover, asymmetric information about rare disasters can quantitatively match key moments of bids and yields, both within and across periods.
28459.zh_abstract: 利用一个包含2001年至2017年所有投标人对墨西哥政府债券所有投标的新数据集，我们证明了关于违约风险的信息不对称是一级市场债券收益率的关键决定因素。实证发现，大型投标人并未比普通投标人为债券支付更多，但他们的投标被接受的频率更高。我们构建了一个模型，其中投资者可能在财富、风险厌恶、市场势力和信息方面存在差异，并发现只有异质性信息才能定性地解释这些模式。此外，关于罕见灾难的信息不对称可以在数量上匹配投标和收益率的关键矩，无论是在时期内部还是跨时期。

28458.title: Gang rule: Understanding and Countering Criminal Governance
28458.zh_title: 帮派统治：理解与打击犯罪治理
28458.authors: Christopher Blattman, Gustavo Duncan, Benjamin Lessing, Santiago Tobón
28458.abstract: Criminal groups govern millions worldwide. Even in strong states, gangs resolve disputes and provide security. Why do these duopolies of coercion emerge? In many cases, gangs fill vacuums of official order. If so, increasing state presence should crowd out criminal governance. In this paper, however, we show that state and gang rule are sometimes complements. In particular, gangs can deter state predation by keeping neighborhoods orderly and loyal. If true, increasing state presence could increase gang rule. We investigate in Medellín, Colombia. Criminal leaders told us they rule mainly to protect drug rents. We test gang responses to state presence using a geographic discontinuity. Internal border changes in 1987 assigned some blocks to be exogenously closer to state security for three decades. Gangs responded to closer state presence by increasing governance services, but primarily in neighborhoods with the greatest potential drug rents. This suggests new strategies for countering criminal governance.
28458.zh_abstract: 犯罪集团统治着全球数百万人。即使在强大的国家，帮派也解决争端并提供安全。为什么这些强制力的双头垄断会出现？在许多情况下，帮派填补了官方秩序的真空。如果是这样，增加国家存在应该会挤出犯罪治理。然而，在本文中，我们表明国家统治和帮派统治有时是互补的。特别是，帮派可以通过保持社区秩序井然和忠诚来阻止国家掠夺。如果这是真的，增加国家存在可能会增加帮派统治。我们在哥伦比亚麦德林进行了调查。犯罪头目告诉我们，他们统治主要是为了保护毒品租金。我们利用地理不连续性测试帮派对国家存在的反应。1987年的内部边界变化使得一些街区在三十年内被外生地分配到更接近国家安全的区域。帮派通过增加治理服务来回应更近的国家存在，但主要是在具有最大潜在毒品租金的社区。这表明了打击犯罪治理的新策略。
28458.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：C93, E26, H11, K42, O17

28457.title: Getting the Price Right? The Impact of Competitive Bidding in the Medicare Program
28457.zh_title: 定价合理吗？医疗保险计划中竞争性招标的影响
28457.authors: Hui Ding, Mark Duggan, Amanda Starc
28457.abstract: We study Medicare's competitive bidding program (CBP) for durable medical equipment (DME). We exploit Medicare claims data to examine both prices and utilization, focusing on continuous positive airway pressure (CPAP) devices to treat sleep apnea. We find that spending falls by 47.2% percent after a highly imperfect bidding mechanism is introduced. The effect is almost entirely driven by a 44.8% price reduction, though quantities also fall by 4.3%. To disentangle supply and demand, we leverage differential cost sharing across Medicare recipients. We measure a demand elasticity of -0.272 and find that quantity reductions are concentrated among less clinically appropriate groups.
28457.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医疗保险针对耐用医疗设备的竞争性招标计划。我们利用医疗保险索赔数据来检查价格和利用率，重点关注用于治疗睡眠呼吸暂停的持续气道正压通气设备。我们发现，在引入一个高度不完善的招标机制后，支出下降了47.2%。这一效应几乎完全由44.8%的价格下降驱动，尽管数量也下降了4.3%。为了分离供给和需求，我们利用了医疗保险受益人间差异化的成本分摊。我们测量了需求弹性为-0.272，并发现数量减少集中在临床适宜性较低的群体中。

28456.title: Sticky Price for Declining Risk? Business Strategies with “Behavioral” Customers in the Hotel Industry
28456.zh_title: 风险下降时价格粘性？酒店业中针对“行为”客户的商业策略
28456.authors: Nicola Lacetera, Claudio A. Piga, Lorenzo Zirulia
28456.abstract: Using data from about twenty-five million hotel room postings in four countries, we document that rather than decreasing to zero as the likelihood of cancellation declines, the difference between the prices for refundable and non-refundable reservations remains positive at roughly 10% to 15% of the full price. A model where travelers have different willingness to pay and some of them overestimate the probability to cancel their trip explains these price-setting patterns more consistently than alternative interpretations. We denote these business strategies as naiveté-based price discrimination. Our data and theory therefore show that this form of apparent inertial behavior of companies regarding a major strategic variable can be an intentional managerial choice. We demonstrate, finally, that this profit-enhancing commitment to limited flexibility may also benefit customers in some cases, by expanding the reach of the market. Thus, strategies that rely on cognitive biases on the demand side may not necessarily exploit consumers.
28456.zh_abstract: 利用来自四个国家约两千五百万条酒店客房挂牌数据，我们记录了可退款和不可退款预订之间的价格差异并未随着取消可能性的下降而降至零，而是保持在总价的约10%至15%的正值。一个模型假设旅行者具有不同的支付意愿，且其中一些人高估了取消行程的概率，这比替代解释更能一致地解释这些定价模式。我们将这些商业策略称为基于天真的价格歧视。因此，我们的数据和理论表明，这种公司关于一个主要战略变量的明显惯性行为形式可能是一种有意的管理选择。最后，我们证明，这种旨在提高利润的对有限灵活性的承诺在某些情况下也可能通过扩大市场覆盖范围而使客户受益。因此，依赖需求方认知偏差的策略不一定是在剥削消费者。

28455.title: To What Extent Does In-Person Schooling Contribute to the Spread of COVID-19? Evidence from Michigan and Washington
28455.zh_title: 面对面教学在多大程度上促进了COVID-19的传播？来自密歇根州和华盛顿州的证据
28455.authors: Dan Goldhaber, Scott A. Imberman, Katharine O. Strunk, Bryant Hopkins, Nate Brown, Erica Harbatkin, Tara Kilbride
28455.abstract: The decision about how and when to open schools to in-person instruction has been a key question for policymakers throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. The instructional modality of schools has implications not only for the health and safety of students and staff, but also student learning and the degree to which parents can engage in job activities. We consider the role of instructional modality (in-person, hybrid, or remote instruction) in disease spread among the wider community. Using a variety of regression modeling strategies , we find that simple correlations show in-person modalities are correlated with increased COVID cases, but accounting for both pre-existing cases and a richer set of covariates brings estimates close to zero on average. In Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) specifications, in-person modality options are not associated with increased spread of COVID at low levels of pre-existing COVID cases but cases do increase at moderate to high pre-existing COVID rates. A bounding exercise suggests that the OLS findings for in-person modality are likely to represent an upper bound on the true relationship. These findings are robust to the inclusion of county and district fixed effects in terms of the insignificance of the findings, but the models with fixed effects are also somewhat imprecisely estimated.
28455.zh_abstract: 在整个COVID-19疫情期间，如何以及何时开放学校进行面对面教学一直是政策制定者的关键问题。学校的教学模式不仅影响学生和教职员工的健康与安全，还影响学生的学习以及父母参与工作活动的程度。我们考虑了教学模式（面对面、混合或远程教学）在更广泛社区疾病传播中的作用。使用多种回归建模策略，我们发现简单相关性显示面对面教学模式与COVID病例增加相关，但考虑既有病例和更丰富的协变量集后，估计值平均接近零。在普通最小二乘法规范中，在既有COVID病例水平较低时，面对面教学模式与COVID传播增加无关，但在既有COVID病例率中等到高时，病例确实会增加。一个边界分析表明，面对面教学模式的普通最小二乘法发现可能代表了真实关系的上限。这些发现在包含县和学区固定效应时，在结果不显著方面是稳健的，但带有固定效应的模型估计也有些不精确。

28454.title: Evaluating Contradictory Experimental and Non-Experimental Estimates of Neighborhood Effects on Economic Outcomes for Adults
28454.zh_title: 评估关于邻里效应对成年人经济结果的矛盾实验与非实验估计
28454.authors: David J. Harding, Lisa Sanbonmatsu, Greg J. Duncan, Lisa A. Gennetian, Lawrence F. Katz, Ronald C. Kessler, Jeffrey R. Kling, Matthew Sciandra, Jens Ludwig
28454.abstract: Although non-experimental studies find robust neighborhood effects on adults, such findings have been challenged by results from the Moving to Opportunity (MTO) residential mobility experiment. Using a within-study comparison design, this paper compares experimental and non-experimental estimates from MTO and a parallel analysis of the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID). Striking similarities were found between non-experimental estimates based on MTO and PSID. No clear evidence was found that different estimates are related to duration of adult exposure to disadvantaged neighborhoods, non-linear effects of neighborhood conditions, magnitude of the change in neighborhood context, frequency of moves, treatment effect heterogeneity, or measurement, although uncertainty bands around our estimates were sometimes large. One other possibility is that MTO-induced moves might have been unusually disruptive, but results are inconsistent for that hypothesis. Taken together, the findings suggest that selection bias might account for evidence of neighborhood effects on adult economic outcomes in non-experimental studies.
28454.zh_abstract: 尽管非实验研究发现邻里效应对成年人有显著影响，但此类发现受到了“搬向机会”居住流动性实验结果的挑战。采用研究内比较设计，本文比较了来自“搬向机会”实验和“收入动态面板研究”平行分析中的实验与非实验估计。基于“搬向机会”和“收入动态面板研究”的非实验估计之间发现了惊人的相似性。没有明确证据表明不同估计与成年人暴露于弱势邻里的持续时间、邻里条件的非线性效应、邻里环境变化的幅度、搬迁频率、处理效应异质性或测量有关，尽管我们的估计置信区间有时较大。另一种可能性是，“搬向机会”引发的搬迁可能异常具有破坏性，但结果与该假设不一致。综合来看，研究结果表明，选择偏差可能解释了非实验研究中关于邻里效应对成年人经济结果的证据。
28454.meta: Programs：CH, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I3, J0

28453.title: Artificial Intelligence, Globalization, and Strategies for Economic Development
28453.zh_title: 人工智能、全球化与经济发展战略
28453.abstract: Progress in artificial intelligence and related forms of automation technologies threatens to reverse the gains that developing countries and emerging markets have experienced from integrating into the world economy over the past half century, aggravating poverty and inequality. The new technologies have the tendency to be labor-saving, resource-saving, and to give rise to winner-takes-all dynamics that advantage developed countries. We analyze the economic forces behind these developments and describe economic policies that would mitigate the adverse effects on developing and emerging economies while leveraging the potential gains from technological advances. We also describe reforms to our global system of economic governance that would share the benefits of AI more widely with developing countries.
28453.zh_abstract: 人工智能及相关自动化技术的进步，有可能逆转发展中国家和新兴市场在过去半个世纪通过融入世界经济所获得的收益，加剧贫困和不平等。这些新技术具有节省劳动力、节省资源的趋势，并引发有利于发达国家的赢家通吃动态。我们分析了这些发展背后的经济力量，并描述了能够减轻对发展中国家和新兴经济体不利影响，同时利用技术进步潜在收益的经济政策。我们还描述了改革全球经济治理体系的方案，以更广泛地与发展中国家分享人工智能的收益。
28453.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, IFM, LS, PR；JEL：F6, F63, O3, O32

28452.title: The Recovery From The Great Recession: A Long, Evolving Expansion
28452.zh_title: 大衰退后的复苏：一场漫长而不断演进的扩张
28452.authors: Jay C. Shambaugh, Michael R. Strain
28452.abstract: Prior to 2020, the Great Recession was the most important macroeconomic shock to the United States economy in generations. Millions lost jobs and homes. At its peak, one in ten workers who wanted a job could not find one. On an annual basis, the economy contracted by more than it had since the Great Depression. A slow and steady recovery followed the Great Recession's official end in the summer of 2009, but because it was slow and the depth of the recession so deep, it took years to reduce slack in labor markets. But because the slow-and-steady recovery lasted so long, many pre-recession peaks were exceeded, and eventually real wage growth began to accumulate for workers across the distribution. In fact, the business cycle (including recession and recovery) beginning in December 2007 was one of the better periods of real wage growth in many decades, with the bulk of that coming in the last years of the recovery. We place the Great Recession in historical context and trace the path of the recovery, studying its different phases and how different groups of workers were impacted in each phase. We also discuss the response of fiscal and monetary policy to the Great Recession, and draw lessons for the future.
28452.zh_abstract: 在2020年之前，大衰退是美国经济几代人以来最重要的宏观经济冲击。数百万人失去了工作和住房。在衰退高峰期，每十名想要工作的工人中就有一人找不到工作。按年度计算，经济收缩幅度超过了大萧条以来的任何时期。大衰退于2009年夏季正式结束后，随之而来的是缓慢而稳定的复苏。但由于复苏速度缓慢且衰退程度极深，劳动力市场的闲置状况花费了数年时间才得以缓解。然而，正因为这场缓慢而稳定的复苏持续了很长时间，许多衰退前的峰值被超越，最终，各收入阶层的工人都开始积累实际工资增长。事实上，始于2007年12月的这个商业周期（包括衰退和复苏）是几十年来实际工资增长表现较好的时期之一，其中大部分增长发生在复苏的最后几年。我们将大衰退置于历史背景中，追溯复苏的路径，研究其不同阶段以及不同工人群体在每个阶段受到的影响。我们还讨论了财政和货币政策对大衰退的应对，并总结了未来的经验教训。

28410.title: Political Violence, Risk Aversion, and Non-Localized Disease Spread: Evidence from the U.S. Capitol Riot
28410.zh_title: 政治暴力、风险规避与非本地化疾病传播：来自美国国会大厦暴乱的证据
28410.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia
28410.abstract: On January 6, 2021, the U.S. Capitol was sieged by rioters protesting certification of Joseph R. Biden’s election as the 46th president of the United States. The Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) quickly predicted that the Riot would be a COVID-19 “surge event.” This study is the first to estimate the impact of the Capitol Riot on risk-averting behavior and community-level spread of the novel coronavirus. First, using anonymized smartphone data from SafeGraph, Inc. and an event-study approach, we document that on January 6th there was a substantial increase in non-resident smartphone pings in the census block groups including the Ellipse, the National Mall, and the U.S. Capitol Building, consistent with a large protest that day. Next, using data from the same source and a synthetic control approach, we find that the Capitol Riot increased stay-at-home behavior among District of Columbia residents, indicative of risk averting behaviors in response to violence and health risks. Finally, turning to COVID-19 case data, we find no evidence that the Capitol Riot substantially increased community spread of COVID-19 in the District of Columbia in the month-long period following the event. This may be due to increases in social distancing and a “virtual lockdown” of the Capitol prior to the inauguration of the new president. However, exploiting variation in non-resident smartphone inflows into the January 6 Capitol protest, we find that counties with the highest protester inflows experienced a significant increase in the rate of daily cumulative COVID-19 case growth in the month following the protest. We conclude that the Capitol Riot may have contributed to non-localized COVID-19 spread.
28410.zh_abstract: 2021年1月6日，美国国会大厦被抗议约瑟夫·R·拜登当选美国第46任总统认证的暴徒围攻。美国疾病控制与预防中心主任迅速预测该暴乱将成为COVID-19的“激增事件”。本研究首次估计了国会大厦暴乱对风险规避行为和社区层面新型冠状病毒传播的影响。首先，利用SafeGraph公司的匿名智能手机数据和事件研究方法，我们记录了1月6日，在包括椭圆广场、国家广场和美国国会大厦的人口普查区块组中，非居民智能手机信号大幅增加，这与当天的大规模抗议活动一致。接下来，使用相同来源的数据和合成控制方法，我们发现国会大厦暴乱增加了哥伦比亚特区居民的居家行为，表明了对暴力和健康风险的风险规避行为。最后，转向COVID-19病例数据，我们没有发现证据表明国会大厦暴乱在事件发生后一个月内大幅增加了哥伦比亚特区的社区传播。这可能是由于社交距离的增加以及新总统就职前国会大厦的“虚拟封锁”。然而，利用1月6日国会抗议活动中非居民智能手机流入的变化，我们发现抗议者流入最多的县在抗议后一个月内每日累计COVID-19病例增长率显著增加。我们得出结论，国会大厦暴乱可能导致了非本地化的COVID-19传播。
28410.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D8, H75, I1

28492.title: Preparing for a Pandemic: Accelerating Vaccine Availability
28492.zh_title: 为疫情做准备：加速疫苗供应
28492.authors: Amrita Ahuja, Susan Athey, Arthur Baker, Eric Budish, Juan Camilo Castillo, Rachel Glennerster, Scott Duke Kominers, Michael Kremer, Jean Nahrae Lee, Canice Prendergast, Christopher M. Snyder, Alex Tabarrok, Brandon Joel Tan, Witold Więcek
28492.abstract: Vaccinating the world’s population quickly in a pandemic has enormous health and economic benefits. We analyze the problem faced by governments in determining the scale and structure of procurement for vaccines. We analyze alternative approaches to procurement. We find that if the goal is to accelerate the vaccine delivery timetable, buyers should directly fund manufacturing capacity and shoulder most of the risk of failure, while maintaining some direct incentives for speed. We analyzed the optimal portfolio of vaccine investments for countries with different characteristics as well as the implications for international cooperation. Our analysis, considered in light of the experience of 2020, suggests lessons for future pandemics.
28492.zh_abstract: 在大流行中快速为全球人口接种疫苗具有巨大的健康和经济利益。我们分析了政府在确定疫苗采购规模和结构时所面临的问题。我们分析了替代采购方法。我们发现，如果目标是加速疫苗交付时间表，买家应直接资助制造能力并承担大部分失败风险，同时保持一些直接的速度激励。我们分析了针对不同特征国家的最优疫苗投资组合，以及对国际合作的影响。结合2020年的经验，我们的分析为未来大流行提供了教训。
28492.meta: Programs：EH, IO；JEL：D02, H12, I11, I18, O19, O31

28491.title: Contractual Rigidity and Political Contestability: Revisiting Public Contract Renegotiations
28491.zh_title: 合同刚性与政治竞争性：重新审视公共合同重新谈判
28491.authors: Jean Beuve, Marian W. Moszoro, Pablo T. Spiller
28491.abstract: We present a model of public procurement in which both contractual flexibility and political tolerance for contractual deviations determine renegotiations. In the model, contractual flexibility allows for adaptation without formal renegotiation while political tolerance for deviations decreases with political competition. We then compare renegotiation rates of procurement contracts in which the procurer is either a public administration or a private corporation. We find robust evidence consistent with the model predictions: public-to-private contracts are renegotiated more often than comparable private-to-private contracts, and that this pattern is more salient in politically contestable jurisdictions. The frequent renegotiation of public contracts results from their inherent rigidity and provides a relational quality of adaptability to contingencies in politically contestable environments.
28491.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个公共采购模型，其中合同灵活性和对合同偏离的政治容忍度共同决定了重新谈判。在该模型中，合同灵活性允许无需正式重新谈判即可进行调整，而对偏离的政治容忍度随着政治竞争加剧而降低。然后，我们比较了采购方是公共行政部门或私营公司的采购合同的重新谈判率。我们发现了与模型预测一致的稳健证据：公共对私人合同比可比的私人对私人合同更常被重新谈判，并且这种模式在政治竞争激烈的司法管辖区更为显著。公共合同的频繁重新谈判源于其固有的刚性，并在政治竞争环境中提供了对偶发事件的适应性关系质量。
28491.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D23, D72, D73, D78, H57

28490.title: Do Required Minimum Distribution 401(k) Rules Matter, and For Whom? Insights from a Lifecycle Model
28490.zh_title: 最低提款401(k)规则是否重要，对谁重要？来自生命周期模型的见解
28490.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
28490.abstract: Tax-qualified vehicles helped U.S. private-sector workers accumulate $\$25$Tr in retirement assets. An often-overlooked important institutional feature shaping decumulations from these retirement plans is the “Required Minimum Distribution” (RMD) regulation, requiring retirees to withdraw a minimum fraction from their retirement accounts or pay excise taxes on withdrawal shortfalls. Our calibrated lifecycle model measures the impact of RMD rules on financial behavior of heterogeneous households during their worklives and retirement. We show that proposed reforms to delay or eliminate the RMD rules should have little effects on consumption profiles but more impact on withdrawals and tax payments for households with bequest motives.
28490.zh_abstract: 税收合格工具帮助美国私营部门工人积累了25万亿美元的退休资产。一个常被忽视但重要的制度特征塑造了这些退休计划的资产提取，即“最低提款”规定，要求退休人员从其退休账户中提取最低比例，否则需对提款不足部分缴纳消费税。我们校准的生命周期模型衡量了最低提款规则对异质性家庭在工作生涯和退休期间财务行为的影响。我们表明，提议的延迟或取消最低提款规则的改革对消费概况影响很小，但对有遗赠动机的家庭的提款和税收支付影响更大。

28489.title: The Two Faces of Information
28489.abstract: In absence of insurance contracts to share risk, public information is a double-edged sword. On the one hand, it empowers self-insurance as agents better react to shocks, reducing risk. On the other hand, it weakens market-insurance as common knowledge of shocks restricts trading risk. We embody these two faces of information in a single general-equilibrium model. We characterize the conditions under which market-insurance is superior, and then public information – even though costless and precise – is socially undesirable. In the absence of information, however, market-insurance is still underprovided as individuals fail to internalize its general equilibrium benefits.
28489.zh_abstract: 在缺乏分担风险的保险合约的情况下，公共信息是一把双刃剑。一方面，它增强了自我保险，因为代理人能更好地应对冲击，从而降低风险。另一方面，它削弱了市场保险，因为冲击的公共知识限制了风险交易。我们将信息的这两面性融入一个单一的一般均衡模型中。我们刻画了市场保险更优的条件，此时公共信息——即使免费且精确——在社会上也是不可取的。然而，在缺乏信息的情况下，市场保险仍然供给不足，因为个体未能内化其一般均衡收益。
28489.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D52, D53, D62, D8, E21, G11, G12, G14

28488.title: Culture, Institutions & the Long Divergence
28488.authors: Alberto Bisin, Jared Rubin, Avner Seror, Thierry Verdier
28488.abstract: Recent theories of the Long Divergence between Middle Eastern and Western European economies focus on Middle Eastern (over-)reliance on religious legitimacy, use of slave soldiers, and persistence of restrictive proscriptions of religious (Islamic) law. These theories take as exogenous the cultural values that complement the prevailing institutions. As a result, they miss the role of cultural values in either supporting the persistence of or inducing change in the economic and institutional environment. In this paper, we address these issues by modeling the joint evolution of institutions and culture. In doing so, we place the various hypotheses of economic divergence into one, unifying framework. We highlight the role that cultural transmission plays in reinforcing institutional evolution toward either theocratic or secular states. We extend the model to shed light on political decentralization and technological change in the two regions.
28488.zh_abstract: 关于中东与西欧经济体之间长期分化的近期理论，聚焦于中东（过度）依赖宗教合法性、使用奴隶士兵以及宗教（伊斯兰）法限制性禁令的持续存在。这些理论将补充现行制度的文化价值观视为外生给定。因此，它们忽略了文化价值观在支持经济与制度环境持续存在或引发变革中的作用。在本文中，我们通过模拟制度与文化的共同演化来解决这些问题。在此过程中，我们将经济分化的各种假说纳入一个统一框架。我们强调文化传播在强化制度演化走向神权或世俗国家中的作用。我们扩展了模型，以阐明这两个地区的政治分权和技术变革。
28488.meta: Programs：POL；JEL：N34, N35, O10, O33, P16, P48

28487.title: Kinks as Goals: Accelerating Commissions and the Performance of Sales Teams
28487.zh_title: 拐点作为目标：加速佣金与销售团队绩效
28487.abstract: We study the performance of small retail sales teams facing an incentive scheme that includes both a lump sum bonus and multiple accelerators (kinks where the commission rate jumps upward). Consistent with standard labor supply models, we find that the presence of an attainable bonus or kink on a work-day raises mean sales, and that sales are highly bunched at the bonus; inconsistent with those models we find that teams bunch at the kinks instead of avoiding them. Combining simple theoretical models, institutional evidence, and heterogeneity analyses, we argue that that this unexpected bunching results from a previously unrecognized motivational benefit of piecewise linear reward schemes in team environments: Teams use the convenient, salient, kink-points as shared goals, which yield symbolic utility to their members when the points are attained.
28487.zh_abstract: 我们研究了小型零售销售团队在面对包含一次性奖金和多个加速器（佣金率向上跳跃的拐点）的激励方案时的绩效。与标准劳动供给模型一致，我们发现工作日存在可达的奖金或拐点会提高平均销售额，且销售额高度集中在奖金点；但与这些模型不一致的是，我们发现团队集中在拐点处而非避开它们。结合简单理论模型、制度证据和异质性分析，我们认为这种意外的集中源于团队环境中分段线性奖励方案先前未被认识到的激励益处：团队将便捷、显著的拐点用作共享目标，当这些点达到时，为其成员提供象征性效用。

28486.title: Aggregate Implications of Barriers to Female Entrepreneurship
28486.zh_title: 女性创业障碍的总体经济影响
28486.abstract: We develop a framework for quantifying barriers to labor force participation (LFP) and entrepreneurship faced by women in India. We find substantial barriers to LFP, and higher costs of expanding businesses through the hiring of workers for women entrepreneurs. However, there is one area in which female entrepreneurs have an advantage: the hiring of female workers. We show that this is not driven by the sectoral composition of female employment. Consistent with this pattern, policies promoting female entrepreneurship can significantly increase female LFP even without explicitly targeting female LFP. Counterfactual simulations indicate that removing all excess barriers faced by women entrepreneurs would substantially increase the fraction of female-owned firms, female LFP, earnings, and generate substantial gains for the economy. These gains are due to higher LFP, higher real wages and profits, and reallocation: low productivity male-owned firms previously sheltered from female competition are replaced by higher productivity female-owned firms previously excluded from the economy.
28486.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个量化框架，用于评估印度女性在劳动力参与和创业方面面临的障碍。研究发现，女性在劳动力参与方面存在显著障碍，且女性企业家通过雇佣工人来扩大业务的成本更高。然而，女性企业家在一个领域具有优势：雇佣女性工人。我们表明，这一现象并非由女性就业的部门构成所驱动。与此模式一致，促进女性创业的政策即使没有明确针对女性劳动力参与，也能显著提高女性劳动力参与率。反事实模拟表明，消除女性企业家面临的所有额外障碍将大幅增加女性所有企业的比例、提高女性劳动力参与率和收入，并为经济带来显著收益。这些收益源于更高的劳动力参与率、更高的实际工资和利润，以及资源重新配置：此前受女性竞争保护的低生产率男性所有企业，将被此前被排除在经济之外的高生产率女性所有企业所取代。
28486.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J16, J70, O17, O40

28485.title: Fiscal Policy and Households’ Inflation Expectations: Evidence from a Randomized Control Trial
28485.zh_title: 财政政策与家庭通胀预期：来自随机对照试验的证据
28485.authors: Olivier Coibion, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Michael Weber
28485.abstract: Rising government debt levels around the world are raising the specter that authorities might seek to inflate away the debt. In theoretical settings where fiscal policy “dominates” monetary policy, higher debt without offsetting changes in primary surpluses should lead households to anticipate this higher inflation. Are household inflation expectations sensitive to fiscal considerations in practice? We field a large randomized control trial on U.S. households to address this question by providing randomly chosen subsets of households with information treatments about the fiscal outlook and then observing how they revise their expectations about future inflation as well as taxes and government spending. We find that information about the current debt or deficit levels has little impact on inflation expectations but that news about future debt leads them to anticipate higher inflation, both in the short run and long run. News about rising debt also induces households to anticipate rising spending and a higher rate of interest for government debt.
28485.zh_abstract: 全球政府债务水平的上升引发了当局可能试图通过通胀来稀释债务的担忧。在财政政策“主导”货币政策的理论设定中，更高的债务若没有基本盈余的相应变化，应导致家庭预期到更高的通胀。在实践中，家庭通胀预期是否对财政因素敏感？我们针对美国家庭开展了一项大规模随机对照试验，通过向随机选定的家庭子集提供关于财政前景的信息处理，然后观察他们如何修正对未来通胀、税收和政府支出的预期，来回答这一问题。我们发现，关于当前债务或赤字水平的信息对通胀预期影响甚微，但关于未来债务的消息会导致他们预期短期和长期通胀上升。关于债务上升的消息还促使家庭预期支出增加以及政府债务利率上升。

28484.title: Biases in Information Selection and Processing: Survey Evidence from the Pandemic
28484.zh_title: 信息选择与处理中的偏差：来自大流行调查的证据
28484.authors: Ester Faia, Andreas Fuster, Vincenzo Pezone, Basit Zafar
28484.abstract: How people form beliefs is crucial for understanding decision-making under uncertainty. This is particularly true in a situation such as a pandemic, where beliefs will affect behaviors that impact public health as well as the aggregate economy. We conduct two survey experiments to shed light on potential biases in belief formation, focusing in particular on the tone of information people choose to consume and how they incorporate this information into their beliefs. In the first experiment, people express their preferences over pandemic-related articles with optimistic and pessimistic headlines, and are then randomly shown one of the articles. We find that respondents with more pessimistic prior beliefs about the pandemic are substantially more likely to prefer pessimistic articles, which we interpret as evidence of confirmation bias. In line with this, respondents assigned to the less preferred article rate it as less reliable and informative (relative to those who prefer it); they also discount information from the article when it is less preferred. We further find that these motivated beliefs end up impacting incentivized behavior. In a second experiment, we study how partisan views interact with information selection and processing. We find strong evidence of source dependence: revealing the news source further distorts information acquisition and processing, eliminating the role of prior beliefs in article choice.
28484.zh_abstract: 人们如何形成信念对于理解不确定性下的决策至关重要。在大流行等情况下尤其如此，因为信念会影响影响公共卫生和整体经济的行为。我们进行了两项调查实验，以揭示信念形成中的潜在偏差，特别关注人们选择消费的信息基调以及他们如何将这些信息纳入信念。在第一个实验中，人们表达了对带有乐观和悲观标题的大流行相关文章的偏好，然后被随机展示其中一篇文章。我们发现，对大流行持有更悲观先验信念的受访者明显更倾向于选择悲观文章，我们将其解释为确认偏差的证据。与此一致，被分配到不太喜欢的文章的受访者（相对于那些喜欢它的人）认为该文章可靠性更低、信息量更少；当文章不太受欢迎时，他们也会忽略其中的信息。我们进一步发现，这些动机性信念最终会影响激励行为。在第二个实验中，我们研究了党派观点如何与信息选择和处理相互作用。我们发现了来源依赖性的有力证据：揭示新闻来源进一步扭曲了信息获取和处理，消除了先验信念在文章选择中的作用。
28484.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D84, D91, E71, I12

28483.title: Housing Consumption and the Cost of Remote Work
28483.zh_title: 住房消费与远程工作的成本
28483.abstract: This paper estimates housing choice differences between households with and without remote workers. Prior to the pandemic, the expenditure share on housing was more than seven percent higher for remote households compared to similar non-remote households in the same commuting zone. Remote households’ higher housing expenditures arise from larger dwellings (more rooms) and a higher price per room. Pre-COVID, households with remote workers were actually located in areas with above-average housing costs, and sorting within-commuting zone to suburban or rural areas was not economically meaningful. Using the pre-COVID distribution of locations, we estimate how much additional pre-tax income would be necessary to compensate non-remote households for extra housing expenses arising from remote work in the absence of geographic mobility, and we compare this compensation to commercial office rents in major metro areas.
28483.zh_abstract: 本文估计了有远程工作者和无远程工作者的家庭之间的住房选择差异。在大流行之前，与同一通勤区内相似的无远程工作者家庭相比，远程工作家庭的住房支出份额高出7%以上。远程工作家庭更高的住房支出源于更大的居住空间（更多房间）和更高的每间房价格。在新冠疫情前，有远程工作者的家庭实际上位于住房成本高于平均水平的地区，而在通勤区内向郊区或农村地区的分类在经济上并不显著。利用新冠疫情前的居住地分布，我们估计了在缺乏地理流动性的情况下，需要多少额外的税前收入才能补偿无远程工作者家庭因远程工作而产生的额外住房支出，并将这一补偿与主要大都市区的商业办公租金进行了比较。
28483.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：J32, J81, J82, R21, R3, R40

28482.title: Competition Policy in a Simple General Equilibrium Model
28482.zh_title: 简单一般均衡模型中的竞争政策
28482.abstract: The flow of resources across sectors to their best use, with concomitant entry and exit, is central to the functioning and welfare properties of a market economy. Nevertheless, most industrial organization research, including applications to competition policy, undertakes partial equilibrium analysis in a single sector, often with a fixed number of firms. This article examines competition policy in a simple, multi-sector, general equilibrium model with free entry and exit. Even partial equilibrium analysis yields some lessons, such as that accounting for free entry often makes strengthening competition policy more rather than less attractive. When admitting flows between sectors, familiar prescriptions readily reverse. But such results may be partially offset or overturned yet again when incorporating free entry and exit in nontargeted sectors. Finally, the analysis of efficiencies also changes qualitatively with free entry because even fixed costs are fully borne by consumers in equilibrium.
28482.zh_abstract: 资源跨部门流向其最佳用途，伴随着企业的进入和退出，是市场经济运行和福利属性的核心。然而，大多数产业组织研究，包括竞争政策的应用，都是在单一部门内进行局部均衡分析，且通常假设企业数量固定。本文在一个具有自由进入和退出的简单多部门一般均衡模型中考察竞争政策。即使是局部均衡分析也能得出一些教训，例如，考虑自由进入往往使加强竞争政策更具吸引力而非相反。当考虑部门间的流动时，熟悉的政策建议很容易发生逆转。但若将非目标部门的自由进入和退出纳入考虑，这些结果可能被部分抵消或再次推翻。最后，效率分析也会因自由进入而发生质变，因为在均衡中，即使是固定成本也完全由消费者承担。
28482.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D43, D51, D61, K21, L13, L40

28481.title: Searching for Job Security and the Consequences of Job Loss
28481.zh_title: 寻找工作保障与失业的后果
28481.abstract: Job loss comes with large present value earnings losses which elude workhorse models of unemployment and labor market policy. I propose a parsimonious model of a frictional labor market in which jobs differ in terms of unemployment risk and workers search off- and on-the-job. This gives rise to a job ladder with slippery bottom rungs where unemployment spells beget unemployment spells. I allow for human capital to respond to time spent out of work and estimate the framework on German Social Security data. The model captures the joint response of wages, employment, and unemployment risk to job loss which I measure empirically. The key driver of the “unemployment scar” is the loss in job security and its interaction with the evolution of human capital.
28481.zh_abstract: 失业会带来巨大的现值收入损失，而这一现象在失业和劳动力市场政策的标准工作模型中难以解释。我提出了一个简化的摩擦性劳动力市场模型，其中工作因失业风险而异，工人进行在职和离职搜索。这产生了一个底部阶梯滑动的职业阶梯，即失业期会引发更多的失业期。我允许人力资本对失业时间做出反应，并利用德国社会保障数据估计该框架。该模型捕捉了失业对工资、就业和失业风险的联合反应，我对此进行了实证测量。“失业疤痕”的关键驱动因素是工作保障的丧失及其与人力资本演变的相互作用。

28480.title: Cross-sectoral Externalities Related to Natural Resources and Ecosystem Services
28480.zh_title: 与自然资源和生态系统服务相关的跨部门外部性
28480.authors: Manuel Bellanger, Robert Fonner, Daniel S. Holland, Gary D. Libecap, Douglas W. Lipton, Pierre Scemama, Cameron Speir, Olivier Thébaud
28480.abstract: Standard approaches to environmental and natural resource use externalities generally focus on single-sector resources and user groups. Remedies include Pigouvian-style government constraints, small group controls following Elinor Ostrom, or less frequently, bargaining across users as outlined by Ronald Coase. However, many difficult natural resource management problems involve competing uses of the same resource or multiple interdependent resources, across multiple, heterogeneous sectors. Cross-sectoral externalities are generated and impede attainment of conservation objectives. The multiplicity of resources and stakeholders, who may have different property rights, hold different use or non-use values, have different traditions, or fall under different regulatory regimes, increases the likelihood of multi-jurisdictional conflicts. We provide an institutional analysis following Oliver Williamson’s four-levels of institutions (social embeddedness, institutional environment, governance, resource allocation) to illustrate the sources of potential conflict, the costs of addressing them, and the potentials for exchange. In comparing the costs of alternative approaches, we include transaction costs associated with property rights; the costs of lobbying, implementing, and enforcing government regulation; and the costs of scaling up from small-group controls when resource problems involve multiple sectors and heterogeneous populations. In our illustrative case examples, instruments that are not formal property rights are exchanged at lower transaction costs. We close by discussing how Coasean, Pareto-improving voluntary exchange agreements may be lower cost, more effective, and more durable solutions than alternative management regimes to mitigate cross-sectoral externalities.
28480.zh_abstract: 处理环境和自然资源利用外部性的标准方法通常侧重于单一部门的资源和用户群体。补救措施包括庇古式的政府约束、埃莉诺·奥斯特罗姆提出的小群体控制，或者较少见的、罗纳德·科斯所概述的用户间谈判。然而，许多困难的自然资源管理问题涉及对同一资源或多种相互依赖资源的竞争性使用，且跨越多个异质性部门。跨部门外部性由此产生，并阻碍了保护目标的实现。资源和利益相关者的多样性——他们可能拥有不同的产权、持有不同的使用或非使用价值、拥有不同的传统或受不同监管制度管辖——增加了多司法管辖区冲突的可能性。我们遵循奥利弗·威廉姆森的四层次制度分析框架（社会嵌入性、制度环境、治理、资源配置）进行制度分析，以说明潜在冲突的来源、解决冲突的成本以及交换的可能性。在比较不同方法的成本时，我们考虑了与产权相关的交易成本；游说、实施和执行政府监管的成本；以及当资源问题涉及多个部门和异质群体时，从小群体控制进行规模扩展的成本。在我们的说明性案例中，非正式产权工具以较低的交易成本进行交换。最后，我们讨论了科斯式的、帕累托改进的自愿交换协议如何可能成为比替代管理制度成本更低、更有效、更持久的解决方案，以缓解跨部门外部性。
28480.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：D23, H23, H73, P48, Q20, Q22

28479.title: The Effect of Stock Ownership on Individual Spending and Loyalty
28479.zh_title: 股票所有权对个人消费和忠诚度的影响
28479.authors: Paolina C. Medina, Vrinda Mittal, Michaela Pagel
28479.abstract: In this study, we quantify the effects of receiving stocks from certain brands on spending in the brand's stores. We use data from a new FinTech company called Bumped that opens brokerage accounts for its users and rewards them with stocks when they shop at previously elected stores. For identification, we use 1) the staggered distribution of brokerage accounts over time after individuals sign up for a waitlist and 2) randomly distributed stock grants. We find that individuals spend 40% more per week at elected brands and stores after being allocated an account. In response to receiving a stock grant, individuals increase their weekly spending by 100% on the granted brands. Beyond documenting a causal link between stock ownership and individual spending, we show that weekly spending in certain brands of our users is strongly correlated with stock holdings of that brand by Robinhood brokerage clients. Finally, we present survey evidence to argue that loyalty is the dominant psychological mechanism explaining our findings. We thus provide micro evidence for the idea that stock ownership drives brand loyalty, which is an intangible asset that leads to lower firm cash flow volatility.
28479.zh_abstract: 在本研究中，我们量化了从特定品牌获得股票对该品牌门店消费的影响。我们使用一家名为Bumped的新金融科技公司的数据，该公司为其用户开设经纪账户，并在用户于先前选定的商店购物时奖励他们股票。为了识别因果关系，我们利用1）个人在注册等待名单后，经纪账户随时间交错发放的情况，以及2）随机分配的股票赠予。我们发现，在获得账户后，个人在选定品牌和商店的每周消费增加了40%。作为对获得股票赠予的回应，个人在获赠品牌上的每周消费增加了100%。除了记录股票所有权与个人消费之间的因果关系外，我们还表明，我们用户在特定品牌的每周消费与Robinhood经纪客户对该品牌的股票持有量密切相关。最后，我们提供调查证据，论证忠诚度是解释我们研究结果的主要心理机制。因此，我们为股票所有权驱动品牌忠诚度这一观点提供了微观证据，品牌忠诚度是一种无形资产，可降低公司现金流波动性。
28479.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：G02, G4, G41, G5, G51

28478.title: Vertical Integration and Production Inefficiency in the Presence of a Gross Receipts Tax
28478.zh_title: 存在总收入税时的纵向整合与生产低效率
28478.authors: Benjamin Hansen, Keaton S. Miller, Caroline Weber
28478.abstract: We quantify the effects of a gross receipts tax (GRT) on vertical integration for the first time. We use data from the Washington state recreational cannabis industry, which has numerous advantages including a clean natural experiment: a 25% GRT imposed on cannabis firms was subsequently replaced by an excise tax at retail. We find the short-run elasticity of vertical integration with respect to the intermediate good net- of-tax rate is -0.15 and the long-run elasticity is more than twice as large. We find these incentives lead to large output losses – production increases by 23 percent when the GRT is eliminated.
28478.zh_abstract: 我们首次量化了总收入税对纵向整合的影响。我们使用了华盛顿州娱乐用大麻行业的数据，该数据具有诸多优势，包括一个干净的自然实验：对大麻企业征收的25%总收入税随后被零售环节的消费税所取代。我们发现，纵向整合对中间品税后率的短期弹性为-0.15，而长期弹性则超过其两倍。我们发现这些激励导致了巨大的产出损失——当总收入税被取消时，产量增加了23%。
28478.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：H21, H25, H26, H30, H71, I28, L51, L6

28477.title: Charter Schools’ Effectiveness, Mechanisms, and Competitive Influence
28477.zh_title: 特许学校的有效性、机制与竞争影响
28477.authors: Sarah R. Cohodes, Katharine S. Parham
28477.abstract: This paper reviews the research on the impacts of charter school attendance on students’ academic and other outcomes, the mechanisms behind those effects, and the influence of charter schools on nearby traditional public schools, almost three decades after the first charter school was established. Across the United States, charter schools appear to perform, on average, at about the same level as their district counterparts. Underlying the similarity in performance across sectors is a consistent finding: charters located in urban areas boost student test scores, particularly for Black, Latinx, and low-income students. Attending some urban charter schools also increases college enrollment and voting and reduces risky behavior, but evidence on such longer-term outcomes has been found in only a few sites and has a limited time horizon. No Excuses charter schools generate test score gains, but their controversial disciplinary practices are not a necessary a condition for academic success. Charter school teachers tend to be less qualified and more likely to leave the profession than traditional public school teachers, though the labor market implications are understudied. The influence of charter authorizers and related accountability structures is also limited and would benefit from more rigorous examination. The competitive impact of charter schools on traditional public schools suggests a small, beneficial influence on neighboring schools’ student achievement, though there is variation across contexts. Charters also appear to induce a negative financial impact for districts, at least in the short term, though a larger scale study finds charter entry generates more revenue per pupil for district schools. Finally, there is competing evidence on charters’ contribution to school racial segregation, and little evidence on the impact of newer, intentionally diverse school models. While we know much about charter schools, more research, in more contexts, is needed to further understand where, for whom, and why charters are most effective.
28477.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了自第一所特许学校成立近三十年来，关于特许学校入学对学生学业及其他成果影响、其背后的作用机制，以及特许学校对周边传统公立学校影响的研究。在全美范围内，特许学校的平均表现似乎与其对应的学区学校大致相当。跨部门表现相似性背后有一个一致的发现：位于城市地区的特许学校能提高学生的考试成绩，尤其是对黑人、拉丁裔和低收入学生而言。就读一些城市特许学校还能提高大学入学率和投票率，并减少风险行为，但关于此类长期结果的证据仅在少数地区发现，且时间跨度有限。“无借口”特许学校能带来考试成绩的提升，但其有争议的纪律实践并非学业成功的必要条件。特许学校的教师往往资质较低，且比传统公立学校教师更可能离开该职业，尽管劳动力市场的影响尚未得到充分研究。特许学校授权机构及相关问责结构的影响也有限，需要更严格的审查。特许学校对传统公立学校的竞争影响表明，其对邻近学校的学生成绩有微小的积极影响，尽管不同情境下存在差异。特许学校似乎也对学区造成负面财务影响，至少在短期内如此，尽管一项更大规模的研究发现，特许学校的进入为学区学校带来了更多生均收入。最后，关于特许学校对学校种族隔离的贡献存在相互矛盾的证据，而关于较新的、有意多元化的学校模式的影响则几乎没有证据。尽管我们对特许学校了解甚多，但仍需在更多情境下进行更多研究，以进一步了解特许学校在何处、对谁以及为何最为有效。

28476.title: Urban Growth Shadows
28476.authors: David Cuberes, Klaus Desmet, Jordan Rappaport
28476.abstract: Does a location's growth benefit or suffer from being geographically close to large economic centers? Spatial proximity may lead to competition and hurt growth, but it may also improve market access and enhance growth. Using data on U.S. counties and metro areas for the period 1840-2017, we document this tradeoff between urban shadows and urban access. Proximity to large urban centers was negatively associated with growth between 1840 and 1920, and positively associated with growth after 1920. Using a two-city spatial model, we show that the secular evolution of inter-city and intra-city commuting costs can account for this. Alternatively, the long-run decline in inter-city shipping costs relative to intra-city commuting costs is also consistent with these observed patterns.
28476.zh_abstract: 一个地点的增长是受益于还是受制于其地理上靠近大型经济中心？空间邻近可能导致竞争并损害增长，但也可能改善市场准入并促进增长。利用1840年至2017年美国县和都市区的数据，我们记录了城市阴影与城市可达性之间的这种权衡。在1840年至1920年间，靠近大型城市中心与增长呈负相关，而在1920年之后则呈正相关。通过一个双城市空间模型，我们表明城际和城内通勤成本的长期演变可以解释这一现象。或者，城际运输成本相对于城内通勤成本的长期下降也与这些观察到的模式一致。
28476.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI；JEL：N91, N92, R11, R12

28475.title: Wage Inequality and Labor Rights Violations
28475.zh_title: 工资不平等与劳动权利侵犯
28475.authors: Ioana Marinescu, Yue Qiu, Aaron Sojourner
28475.abstract: Wage inequality does not fully capture differences in job quality. Jobs also differ along other key dimensions, including the prevalence of labor rights violations. We construct novel measures of labor violation rates using data from federal agencies. Within local industries over time, a 10% increase in the average wage is associated with a 0.15% decrease in the number of violations per employee and a 4% decrease in fines per dollar of pay. Reduced labor market concentration and increased union coverage rate are also associated with reductions in labor violations. Overall, labor violations are regressive: they increase inequality in job quality.
28475.zh_abstract: 工资不平等并不能完全反映工作质量的差异。工作在其他关键维度上也存在差异，包括劳动权利侵犯的普遍程度。我们利用联邦机构的数据构建了新的劳动侵权率衡量指标。在地方行业内部随时间变化，平均工资每增加10%，与每位员工侵权数量减少0.15%以及每美元工资罚款减少4%相关。劳动力市场集中度的降低和工会覆盖率的提高也与劳动侵权的减少相关。总体而言，劳动侵权是累退的：它们加剧了工作质量的不平等。
28475.meta: Programs：LE, LS；JEL：J28, J31, J32, J33, J83, K31, K42

28474.title: Owner Incentives and Performance in Healthcare: Private Equity Investment in Nursing Homes
28474.zh_title: 医疗保健中的所有者激励与绩效：私募股权对养老院投资
28474.authors: Atul Gupta, Sabrina T. Howell, Constantine Yannelis, Abhinav Gupta
28474.abstract: Amid an aging population and a growing role for private equity (PE) in elder care, this paper studies how PE ownership aﬀects U.S. nursing homes using patient-level Medicare data. We show that PE ownership leads to lower-risk patients and increases mortality. After instrumenting for the patient-nursing home match, we recover a local average treatment eﬀect on mortality of 11%. Declines in measures of patient well-being, nurse staﬃng, and compliance with care standards help to explain the mortality eﬀect. Overall, we conclude that PE has nuanced eﬀects, with adverse outcomes for a subset of patients.
28474.zh_abstract: 在人口老龄化和私募股权在老年护理中作用日益增强的背景下，本文利用患者层面的医疗保险数据研究了私募股权所有权如何影响美国养老院。我们表明，私募股权所有权导致患者风险较低，并增加了死亡率。在对患者与养老院匹配进行工具变量处理后，我们得出死亡率局部平均处理效应为11%。患者福祉指标、护士配备水平以及护理标准合规性的下降有助于解释死亡率效应。总体而言，我们得出结论，私募股权具有微妙的影响，对一部分患者产生了不利结果。
28474.meta: Programs：CF, EH, PR, TWP；JEL：G3, G32, G34, G38, I1, I18

28499.title: Skipping the Bag: The Intended and Unintended Consequences of Disposable Bag Regulation
28499.zh_title: 跳过袋子：一次性袋子监管的预期与非预期后果
28499.authors: Tatiana Homonoff, Lee-Sien Kao, Javiera Selman, Christina Seybolt
28499.abstract: Regulation of goods associated with negative environmental externalities may decrease consumption of the targeted product, but may be ineffective at reducing the externality itself if close substitutes are left unregulated. We find evidence that plastic bag bans, the most common disposable bag regulation in the US, led retailers to circumvent the regulation by providing free thicker plastic bags which are not covered by the ban. In contrast, a regulation change that replaced the ban with a small tax on all disposable bags generated large decreases in disposable bag use and overall environmental costs. Our results suggest that narrowly-defined regulations (like plastic bag bans) may be less effective than policies that target a more comprehensive set of products, even in the case when the policy instrument itself (a tax rather than a ban) is not as strict.
28499.zh_abstract: 对具有负面环境外部性的商品进行监管，可能会减少目标产品的消费，但如果密切替代品未被监管，则可能无法有效减少外部性本身。我们发现证据表明，塑料袋禁令（美国最常见的一次性袋子监管）导致零售商通过提供不受禁令覆盖的免费更厚塑料袋来规避监管。相比之下，一项将禁令替换为对所有一次性袋子征收小额税的监管变更，显著减少了一次性袋子的使用和总体环境成本。我们的结果表明，即使政策工具本身（税收而非禁令）不那么严格，针对更全面产品组合的政策也可能比狭义定义的监管（如塑料袋禁令）更有效。

28498.title: Social and Genetic Effects on Educational Performance in Early Adolescence
28498.zh_title: 早期青少年教育表现的社会与遗传效应
28498.authors: Martin A. Isungset, Dalton Conley, Henrik D. Zachrisson, Eivind Ystrøm, Alexandra Havdahl, Pål R. Njølstad, Torkild H. Lyngstad
28498.abstract: Research into the intergenerational transmission of educational advantage has long been criticized for not paying sufficient attention to genetics. This study is based on the Norwegian Mother, Father and Child Cohort Study (MoBa) and administrative register data on 25000 genotyped Norwegian children and their parents. We assess and disentangle the relative importance of genetics and social background for children’s standardized academic test scores. Norway offers a particularly interesting context for intergenerational transmission, as the welfare state and educational system is designed to provide equal opportunity structures for children. The results point to genetics only confounding the parent status-offspring achievement relationship to a small degree, to ‘genetic nurture’ effects being small, and pro-vide no evidence of neither Scarr-Rowe interactions in test scores nor parent-child genotype interactions. Even in a universal welfare state with relatively low levels of inequality, there are two systems of ascription, one genetic and one social, and these are largely independent of each other.
28498.zh_abstract: 关于教育优势代际传递的研究长期以来因未充分关注遗传因素而受到批评。本研究基于挪威母亲、父亲与儿童队列研究（MoBa）以及25000名基因分型的挪威儿童及其父母的行政登记数据。我们评估并厘清了遗传和社会背景对儿童标准化学业测试成绩的相对重要性。挪威为代际传递提供了一个特别有趣的背景，因为其福利国家和教育体系旨在为儿童提供平等的机会结构。结果表明，遗传仅对父母地位与子女成就之间的关系产生轻微混淆效应，“遗传培育”效应很小，并且没有证据表明测试成绩中存在Scarr-Rowe交互作用或亲子基因型交互作用。即使在相对低不平等水平的全民福利国家中，也存在两种归因系统——一种遗传性的和一种社会性的，且它们在很大程度上相互独立。

28497.title: The Economics of Spatial Mobility: Theory and Evidence Using Smartphone Data
28497.zh_title: 空间流动的经济学：基于智能手机数据的理论与证据
28497.authors: Yuhei Miyauchi, Kentaro Nakajima, Stephen J. Redding
28497.abstract: We develop a tractable quantitative framework for modelling the rich patterns of spatial mobility observed in smartphone data. We show that travel is frequently undertaken as part of a travel itinerary, defined as a journey starting and ending at home that can include more than one intermediate stop on a given day. We show that these travel itineraries provide microfoundations for consumption externalities and generate both complementarity and substitutability between locations. We show that the consumption externalities implied by travel itineraries are central to matching quasi-experimental evidence from the shift to WFH. We find that these consumption externalities are key drivers of the agglomeration of economic activity in central cities and shape the relative welfare gains from alternative transport improvements in favor of investments in central cities.
28497.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的量化框架，用于建模智能手机数据中观察到的丰富空间流动模式。我们表明，旅行通常作为旅行行程的一部分进行，该行程定义为从家出发并最终返回家的旅程，一天内可包含多个中间停留点。我们证明，这些旅行行程为消费外部性提供了微观基础，并在不同地点之间产生了互补性和替代性。我们进一步表明，旅行行程所隐含的消费外部性对于匹配转向远程办公的准实验证据至关重要。我们发现，这些消费外部性是经济活动集聚于中心城区的关键驱动因素，并塑造了不同交通改善方案（偏向中心城区投资）的相对福利收益。

28496.title: Intellectual Property Infringement by Foreign Firms: Import Protection through the ITC or Court
28496.zh_title: 外国公司的知识产权侵权：通过ITC或法院的进口保护
28496.authors: James A. Brander, Barbara J. Spencer
28496.abstract: This paper examines intellectual property litigation as a method of protection from patent-infringing imports. Claims against patent-infringing imports entering the United States may be filed before the International Trade Commission (ITC) or in district court. The ITC applies injunctions (import prohibitions) that would seem to provide more protection from infringing imports than the standard license fee remedy in court. Settlements prior to legal adjudication are common in both venues. Using a model with Nash bargaining and Cournot competition, we show that an ITC filing may restrict imports by less than in court. This result tends to apply if product differentiation is high and the size of the patented cost-reducing innovation is large.
28496.zh_abstract: 本文考察了知识产权诉讼作为应对专利侵权进口品的一种保护方法。针对进入美国的专利侵权进口品的索赔，可以向国际贸易委员会（ITC）或地区法院提起。ITC适用禁令（进口禁止），这似乎比法院的标准许可费救济更能提供对侵权进口品的保护。在两个司法管辖区，法律裁决前的和解都很常见。通过使用纳什谈判和古诺竞争模型，我们表明，ITC诉讼对进口的限制可能小于法院。当产品差异化程度高且专利成本降低创新的规模大时，这一结果往往成立。

28495.title: The “Matthew Effect” and Market Concentration: Search Complementarities and Monopsony Power
28495.zh_title: “马太效应”与市场集中度：搜索互补性与买方垄断势力
28495.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Federico Mandelman, Yang Yu, Francesco Zanetti
28495.abstract: This paper develops a dynamic general equilibrium model with heterogeneous firms that face search complementarities in the formation of vendor contracts. Search complementarities amplify small differences in productivity among firms. Market concentration fosters monopsony power in the labor market, magnifying profits and further enhancing high-productivity firms' output share. Firms want to get bigger and hire more workers, in stark contrast with the classic monopsony model, where a firm aims to reduce the amount of labor it hires. The combination of search complementarities and monopsony power induces a strong “Matthew effect” that endogenously generates superstar firms out of uniform idiosyncratic productivity distributions. Reductions in search costs increase market concentration, lower the labor income share, and increase wage inequality.
28495.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个异质性企业的动态一般均衡模型，其中企业在形成供应商合同时面临搜索互补性。搜索互补性放大了企业间微小的生产率差异。市场集中度加剧了劳动力市场中的买方垄断势力，放大了利润，并进一步提升了高生产率企业的产出份额。企业希望变得更大并雇佣更多工人，这与经典买方垄断模型形成鲜明对比——在经典模型中，企业旨在减少其雇佣的劳动量。搜索互补性与买方垄断势力的结合引发了强烈的“马太效应”，从均匀的异质性生产率分布中内生地催生出超级明星企业。搜索成本的降低增加了市场集中度，降低了劳动收入份额，并加剧了工资不平等。

28494.title: Gender and the Dynamics of Economics Seminars
28494.zh_title: 性别与经济学研讨会的动态
28494.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Alicia Sasser Modestino, Muriel Niederle, Justin Wolfers, The Seminar Dynamics Collective
28494.abstract: This paper reports the results of the first systematic attempt at quantitatively measuring the seminar culture within economics and testing whether it is gender neutral. We collected data on every interaction between presenters and their audience in hundreds of research seminars and job market talks across most leading economics departments, as well as during summer conferences. We find that women presenters are treated differently than their male counterparts. Women are asked more questions during a seminar and the questions asked of women presenters are more likely to be patronizing or hostile. These effects are not due to women presenting in different fields, different seminar series, or different topics, as our analysis controls for the institution, seminar series, and JEL codes associated with each presentation. Moreover, it appears that there are important differences by field and that these differences are not uniformly mitigated by more rigid seminar formats. Our findings add to an emerging literature documenting ways in which women economists are treated differently than men, and suggest yet another potential explanation for their under-representation at senior levels within the economics profession.
28494.zh_abstract: 本文报告了首次系统量化衡量经济学研讨会文化并检验其是否性别中立的尝试结果。我们收集了在大多数顶尖经济系以及夏季会议期间，数百场研究研讨会和求职市场演讲中演讲者与听众之间每一次互动的数据。我们发现，女性演讲者受到的待遇与男性同行不同。在研讨会期间，女性被问及更多问题，而且向女性演讲者提出的问题更可能带有居高临下或敌意的态度。这些效应并非由于女性在不同领域、不同系列研讨会或不同主题上进行演讲所致，因为我们的分析控制了与每场演讲相关的机构、系列研讨会和JEL代码。此外，不同领域似乎存在重要差异，而这些差异并未通过更严格的研讨会形式得到统一缓解。我们的发现为记录女性经济学家与男性受到不同待遇的新兴文献增添了内容，并提出了经济学界高级职位中女性代表性不足的另一个潜在解释。

28493.title: What Explains Differences in Finance Research Productivity During the Pandemic?
28493.zh_title: 疫情期间金融研究生产力差异的解释因素
28493.authors: Brad M. Barber, Wei Jiang, Adair Morse, Manju Puri, Heather Tookes, Ingrid M. Werner
28493.abstract: Using a survey of AFA members, we analyze how demographics, time allocation, production mechanisms, and institutional factors affect research production during the pandemic. Consistent with the literature, research productivity falls more for women and faculty with young children. Independently and novel, extra time spent teaching (much more likely for women) negatively affects research productivity. Also novel are the results that concerns about feedback, isolation, and health have large negative research effects, disproportionately affecting junior faculty and PhD students. Finally, faculty facing greater concerns about employers’ finances report larger negative research effects and more concerns about feedback, isolation and health.
28493.zh_abstract: 通过对美国金融协会成员的调查，我们分析了人口统计特征、时间分配、生产机制和制度因素如何影响疫情期间的研究产出。与文献一致，女性和有年幼子女的教师的研究生产力下降幅度更大。独立且新颖的是，额外花费在教学上的时间（女性更可能如此）对研究生产力产生负面影响。同样新颖的结果是，对反馈、孤立和健康的担忧对研究产生较大的负面效应，且对初级教师和博士生影响尤为严重。最后，对雇主财务状况有更大担忧的教师报告了更大的负面研究效应，以及对反馈、孤立和健康的更多担忧。

28460.title: Biosimilar Competition: Early Learning
28460.zh_title: 生物类似药竞争：早期经验
28460.authors: Richard G. Frank, Mahnum Shahzad, William B. Feldman, Aaron S. Kesselheim
28460.abstract: Biologics accounted for roughly $\$145$ billion in spending in 2018 (IQVIA, 2019). They are also the fastest growing segment of the pharmaceutical industry. The Biological Price Competition and Innovation Act (BPCIA) of 2010 created an abbreviated pathway for biosimilar products to promote price competition in the market for biological drugs. There was great anticipation that the BPCIA would lead to a moderation in drug prices driven by market competition. The observed levels of competition and the accompanying savings have not reached those expected levels. we investigate the early impacts of entry of potential biosimilar competitors on use of biosimilars and prices for biological products. We focus especially on entry by biosimilars and how altered market structures stemming from the implementation of the BPCIA are affecting the prices for biological products subject to biosimilar competition. We do so by studying 7 products that have recently faced biosimilar competition. We estimate fixed effects and Instrument Variables models to estimate the impact of market competition on prices. Our results indicate that in the range of 1 to 3 entrants each additional marketed product results in a reduction in weighted average market prices of between 5.4 and 7 percentage points.
28460.zh_abstract: 2018年，生物制剂支出约为1450亿美元（IQVIA，2019）。它们也是制药行业中增长最快的部分。2010年的《生物制品价格竞争与创新法案》（BPCIA）为生物类似药创建了一条简化的审批途径，以促进生物药品市场的价格竞争。人们曾高度期待BPCIA将通过市场竞争导致药品价格趋于温和。然而，观察到的竞争水平以及随之而来的节省并未达到预期水平。我们研究了潜在生物类似药竞争者进入对生物类似药使用和生物制品价格的早期影响。我们特别关注生物类似药的进入，以及BPCIA实施所导致的市场结构变化如何影响面临生物类似药竞争的生物制品的价格。为此，我们研究了近期面临生物类似药竞争的7种产品。我们估计了固定效应模型和工具变量模型，以评估市场竞争对价格的影响。我们的结果表明，在1到3个进入者的范围内，每增加一个上市产品，加权平均市场价格将下降5.4到7个百分点。

28473.title: Stochastic Earnings Growth and Equilibrium Wealth Distributions
28473.zh_title: 随机收入增长与均衡财富分布
28473.authors: Thomas J. Sargent, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
28473.abstract: The cross-section distribution of U.S. wealth is more skewed than the distribution of labor earnings. Stachurski and Toda (2019) explain how plain vanilla Bewley-Aiyagari-Huggett (BAH) models with infinitely lived agents can't generate that pattern because an equilibrium risk-free rate is lower than the time rate of preference and each person's wealth process is stationary. We provide two modifications of a BAH model that generate this pattern: (1) overlapping generations of agents who have low wealth at birth and pass through N life-stage transitions of stochastic lengths, and (2) labor-earnings processes that exhibit stochastic growth. With only a few parameters such a model can well approximate mappings from the Lorenz curve and Gini coefficient for cross-sections of labor earnings to their counterparts for cross sections of wealth. Three forces amplify inequality in wealth relative to inequality in labor-earnings: stochastic life-stage transitions; a precautionary savings motive for high wage earners that is especially strong after they receive positive permanent earnings shocks; and an energetic life-cycle saving motive for agents who have low wealth at birth. An equilibrium risk-free interest rate that exceeds a time preference rate fosters a fat-tailed wealth distribution.
28473.zh_abstract: 美国财富的横截面分布比劳动收入的分布更偏斜。Stachurski和Toda（2019）解释了为什么具有无限期生命主体的标准Bewley-Aiyagari-Huggett（BAH）模型无法产生这种模式，因为均衡无风险利率低于时间偏好率，且每个人的财富过程是平稳的。我们提供了BAH模型的两种修改以产生这种模式：（1）代际交叠的主体，他们在出生时财富较低，并经历N个随机长度的生命阶段转换；（2）表现出随机增长的收入过程。仅用少数几个参数，这样的模型就能很好地近似从劳动收入横截面的洛伦兹曲线和基尼系数到财富横截面对应项的映射。三种力量放大了财富不平等相对于劳动收入不平等的程度：随机的生命阶段转换；高收入者因预防性储蓄动机，在收到正向永久性收入冲击后尤为强烈；以及出生时财富较低的主体具有旺盛的生命周期储蓄动机。超过时间偏好率的均衡无风险利率促进了厚尾财富分布的形成。
